Ausgegeben wird darum der Ablauf aus objectiveTokens (Entwicklernamen) und missionFlow (Designer-Beschreibungen).

missions.title: get the goods
missions.desc: Oh hello, I recently overheard a little bit of intel that {address} received some confidential materials that are of great interest to an acquaintance of mine. So interesting that they’re willing to pay for someone to storm the facility, grab the goods, and deliver them to {address}. Now I expect there to be plenty of security, who will most likely put up a fight, so I’d bring a gun or two. Word is the confidential materials were delivered in a consignment alongside other stuff and are now being stored in the facility’s automated vault. Senior security officers on-site carry datapads containing retrieval codes used to access the vault. You’ll have to get your hands on a datapad before using the package conveyor to retrieve the boxes. If you need a little sweetener, I’ve seen the manifest and can confirm that the other crates being stored at the facility are pretty choice. My client could care less about what happens to them, so they’re yours to do as you please. Run this right and those extra crates could be a nice bonus on top of the delivery fee for you.

missions.title: Retrieval Op
missions.desc: Here's the deal – a client of ours (who should have spent the extra credits for a Northrock escort) had one of their ships attacked and now they need us to run point on a retrieval op for an important package that was stolen. Thankfully, we caught a break and were able to track down the people responsible to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. We need you to head there and recover the package. You'll be able to ID it by its serial number: <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4>. I expect that the outlaws are going to put up a fight, but just remember that they aren't the priority. Once you got the package, fly it back to the client at <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. One last thing, make sure you bring a ship that has enough room for some cargo. Don't want you getting all the way there in your Gladius or whatever only to have to turn back. Do us proud, Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group *RETRIEVAL OPERATION SUMMARY* * Recover Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> * Deliver to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>

missions.title: Bounty Assignment: {TargetName} (HRT)
missions.desc: Hey, Got a contract for you that requires a bit more tactics than usual. A high-level criminal by the name {TargetName} is hiding with a large contingent of outlaws at {Address}. Our intel suggests that {Last}’s forces most likely will act as defensive line in order to protect their boss. My best guess is that you will have to deal with them before you gain access to {Last}. That said, I don’t want you shooting indiscriminately. Sometimes these outlaws keep civilians around and they should be treated like non-combatants. Best of luck, Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

missions.title: Defend Site and Retrieve Confidential Materials
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Facility Sweep & Package Retrieval CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent OUTSOURCE MANAGER: G. Livingston RISK ASSESSMENT: High RUSH CONTRACT: Yes Hurston has learned that the Nine Tails are attacking {address}. Our on-site forces have suffered heavy casualties and stopped responding to comms. Initial reports indicated that the gang was attempting to obtain confidential material recently delivered to the facility. Thankfully, we have security measures in place that should give us time to respond. We need an operative to head to the facility immediately, retrieve those boxes, and deliver them to a secure location. You and whatever backup you choose to bring are authorized to take any actions necessary when confronting the trespassers. Suspects are considered armed and dangerous. Hurston will not provide material support and/or updates regarding the status of the facility's security forces. The confidential materials were discreetly delivered alongside other boxes in a consignment and locked in our automated vault with access codes kept on datapads held by senior security staff. However, there’s a strong chance Nine Tails may already have gotten their hands on them. You’ll need to find those datapads and then enter the codes at the package conveyor to retrieve the confidential materials. Payment will be sent once they have been delivered to {address}. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Extermination Job
missions.desc: Rough & Ready has a rat problem. One of our crews tried to pull a little mutiny and now they’ve taken over {address}. Since I can’t be 100% sure they don’t have sympathizers onboard the station, I want you to handle putting down these traitors for me. If you can clear out our little pest issue you’ll be paid handsomely. Just don’t leave a single one of them alive. Don’t want anyone else getting funny ideas. - Smokey

missions.title: They Will Be Missed
missions.desc: A senior security official by the name of {TargetName} has been marked for termination. While they can be found at {Address}, they will not be easy to get to. I fear that a bit of work will be required to draw them out. Normally, I would recommend killing enough of their underlings that they will be forced to face you personally. However, in this instance a more delicate touch is required. While you should feel free to eliminate any and all of the security forces on site, you must ensure the safety of all the civilian workers there. Tiresome for sure, but a requirement none the less. Earnestly, Vaughn

missions.title: Bounty Extraction: {TargetName} (MRT)
missions.desc: Thanks to a recent arrest, we have learned the location of an active bounty by the name of {TargetName}. They are currently believed to be holed up at {Address}. You have been authorized to enter the site, find them, and resolve the bounty. We have every reason to believe that there will be other criminal elements at the site, but for the moment, only {Last} is your concern. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Gibbs ID# 91G66BW0

missions.title: CDF ALERT: {Location} Blockade Runners Needed
missions.desc: *FOR IMMEDIATE SYSTEM-WIDE RELEASE* A hostile fleet of ships equipped with quantum jammers have created a blockade around {address}, disabled the station's defensive turrets, and stolen a large supply of Zeta-Prolanide. In response, the CDF has received authorization to activate its volunteer force. Though the overall situation is dire, the theft of the Zeta-Prolanide is our priority. Without direct action, the loss of the sector's Zeta-Prolanide stores could have a devastating effects to the wider economy of the whole system. While local security forces are investigating the incursion, they've tracked the stolen inventory to several locations. CDF volunteers are tasked with heading to these locations, recovering the stolen Zeta-Prolanide, and transferring it back to the station before the material completely degrades and is no longer viable. Just be careful, intel suggests that larger clusters of Zeta-Prolanide have a higher outlaw presence. Since time is of the essence, having a tractor beam to assist in moving the cargo is highly advised. As an added incentive, volunteers will receive regular bonus payments for their combined efforts.

missions.title: Confiscate Contraband
missions.desc: Crusader Security has learned that an illegal production facility at {Address} is currently being used to manufacture contraband. We are seeking a contractor to secure the site, confiscate any contraband, and deliver it to us at {Address}. The administrative commodity terminal will allow you to submit the contraband into our evidence hold and collect your payment. Now, this is an automated facility so it’s not clear how long they’ll be manufacturing for, or even how many people may be on site. To be safe, I would go in expecting to meet heavy resistance. Your total compensation will be based on how packages are safely delivered into evidence. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Vanzant ID# 712L921P

missions.title: Defend Location and Deliver Confidential Materials
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services need a security professional for a retrieval op at {Location}. The location is currently under attack and security forces on-site are unresponsive and presumed dead. We believe confidential materials recently delivered to the facility for temporary holding were the target of the raid. Your main focus will be collecting those boxes and delivering them to a secure location. For security reasons, the confidential materials were delivered as part of a larger shipment and secured in the automated vault. The materials have unique retrieval codes that must be entered on the keypad at the package conveyor. Protocols require that only senior security officers can carry a datapad containing a code, but considering the volatile situation, we can't guarantee that the Nine Tails haven’t taken possession of them. Once secured, deliver all of the confidential materials to {dropoff1} for payment. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {address}. • Use force as necessary to collect the confidential materials. • Deliver the confidential materials to {address}. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment. • Access to a spaceship that can transport cargo. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques. • Experience hauling important cargo.

missions.title: Overdrive Initiative: INTEL RAID
missions.desc: We've received tips that XenoThreat's intending to launch another attack on Stanton system. The CDF has petitioned the Advocacy to create a new initiative called Operation Overdrive to stop this attack before it happens. The CDF is dispatching volunteers to infiltrate and obtain any intel that could give insight into what they're planning. Needless to say, expect heavy resistance from any XenoThreat on site. As an added incentive, the military has generously donated some old F7A Hornets for CDF members who see this initiative through to the end.

missions.title: Overdrive Initiative: XENOTHREAT INCURSION
missions.desc: Waves of XenoThreat ships have been pushing into Stanton system and attacking random civilians. We can't tell if this is an isolated attack or a reaction to our recent initiatives, but we need them stopped. As a reminder, the military has generously donated some old F7A Hornets for CDF members who see this initiative through to the end.

missions.title: Protect Site and Procure Confidential Materials
missions.desc: ATTN: Mercenaries with Cargo Handling Experience Nine Tails are currently assaulting one of our facilities at {address}. As they just received a delivery of confidential materials, we don’t believe this is a coincidence. BlacJac needs someone to hurry to the location and secure these important boxes before the Nine Tails do. You are authorized to use lethal force against any who attempt to stop you. As part of our standard security protocol, the confidential materials were integrated into another consignment and secured in the automated vault. You’ll need to find the relevant retrieval codes for the confidential materials and enter it at the package conveyor to retrieve the boxes. Retrieval codes are stored locally on datapads and only given to high-ranking staff. Hopefully they’re alive to help you, but considering the complete comms blackout, we fear that’s not the case. There's a chance Nine Tails have already gotten their hands on the datapads. Once you’ve gathered all the confidential materials, they will need to be delivered to {address}. Payment is contingent upon their delivery. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

variants.title: Protect Site and Procure Confidential Materials
Protect Site and Procure Confidential Materials
Protect Site and Procure Confidential Materials
Protect Site and Procure Confidential Materials
Protect Site and Procure Confidential Materials

missions.title: Ripe for Retribution
missions.desc: Some interesting information just fell into my lap. Guess the notorious XenoThreat leader {TargetName} is holed up at {address} working on some big op for them. Perfect opportunity to kill the piece of shit once and for all. Thing is, the Xenos have their eyes all over Headhunter operations at the moment. There’s no way we can mobilize and deploy a crew without {Last} getting tipped off. So I’m offering you the chance to make Pyro a better place and earn some creds at the same time. If interested, I suggest gearing up and finding some backup before heading out. You'll only get paid if you take out {Last}, but don’t hesitate to kill any other little XenoThugs that might be hiding there with ‘em. Stows out.

missions.title: Ripe for the Taking
missions.desc: Got some good news for you. As we speak, there’s an automated facility that is churning out package after package of primo product that’s pretty much ripe for the taking. All you have to do is swoop down there, deal with a thug or two, grab whatever you can, and sell it for a huge profit. Shouldn’t be a problem at all. And there are plenty of people around who would pay good creds to take product like that off your hands. Speaking of credits, I’m not gonna just give out the coordinates of this facility out of the kindness of my heart. I think it’s only fair to ask a finder’s fee for info this good. I wouldn’t wait too long. Not sure how long the site will be left running. -Ruto

missions.title: Support Security Forces and Secure Confidential Materials
missions.desc: Reports indicate that our security staff at {address} have been wiped out by a group of Nine Tails, who are attempting to steal confidential materials that were recently delivered to the facility. Crusader Security needs an experienced contractor to expel the hostiles and secure these boxes. Based on the initial reports, we strongly recommend that you come well-equipped and consider bringing back-up. For security purposes, the confidential materials were transported there as part of a consignment with other boxes and locked in an automated vault. The retrieval codes to access the confidential materials are stored on datapads held by high-ranking security staff, but we don’t know who has them now. Odds are that the Nine Tails will be looking for them too. When you have all the confidential materials, deliver them to {address} to receive payment. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: They Will Be Missed
missions.desc: A security officer by the name of {TargetName} is in desperate need of an early retirement. They are currently stationed at {Address} along with a host of other eager types in uniforms. Feel free to indulge your violent whims, but it is only the death of {TargetName} which will earn you my credit and thanks. Earnestly, Vaughn

missions.title: {LocalDeliveryDrugProdTitle} - {Reward}
missions.desc: {LocalDeliveryDrugProdDesc}

missions.desc: {RecoverStashStealDesc}

missions.title: {RecoverStashTitle} - {Reward}
missions.desc: {RecoverStashDesc}

missions.title: Agent of Chaos
missions.desc: Citizens for Prosperity have entrenched themselves at {Address}. To keep them from getting too comfy at that station, we want to show them what life is really like in our system. We’ll pay you to hit the station, grab the {item}, and kill anyone that gets in your way. Payment hinges on you delivering those supplies to {Address}. Anyone you kill will just be a perk. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Bounty Title Medium
missions.desc: {BountyDescriptionMedium}

missions.title: Combat Assistance - LOW THREAT
missions.desc: [LOW THREAT] ~serviceBeacon(InitiatorName) is requesting combat assistance in deep space. If accepted, you will be paid ~serviceBeacon(PaymentAmount) aUEC upon elimination of the threat. Distance to ~serviceBeacon(InitiatorName) : ~serviceBeacon(DistToInitiator)

missions.title: Comm Array Repair
missions.desc: {CommArrayRepairDescription}

missions.title: Confidential Material Stolen
missions.desc: You available for a job? One of our secure locations got hit by outlaws and some highly confidential material was stolen. As you can imagine, Citizens for Prosperity is eager to recover them as soon as possible. Thanks to a local contact, we were able to trace the outlaws back to {Address} where they're storing the confidential materials inside a secure automated vault. To access it, you’ll need to first find the relevant retrieval code and enter it at the vault’s package conveyor. Our best guess is that one of outlaw leaders will be carrying the code on their person so there is a very strong chance you’ll have to engage with them directly to get it. Once you’ve gotten possession of the confidential material, we want you to deliver it to {Address}. You’ll be making a big difference to a lot of people if you manage to pull this off. Thanks in advance, Lima Endicott Lead Dispatcher Citizens for Prosperity

missions.title: Covalex Cargo Hauling Re-evaluation
missions.desc: Hey, Have a bit of good news for you. Covalex recently finished an evaluation of our contractor pool, and decided to reconsider your status as a cargo hauler. To requalify, all you need is to successfully complete the following delivery. Pick up <EM4>{Item}</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>{Address}</EM4> and deliver it to a freight elevator at <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. In order to complete this haul in a fast and efficient manner, you'll need a ship that can haul <EM4>{MissionMaxSCUSize} cargo containers</EM4>. Hopefully everything goes smoothly so we can welcome you back to the team. By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along. Covalex Shipping 'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

missions.title: Deploy Probe
missions.desc: {DeployProbeDescription}

missions.title: Expel Claimjumpers
missions.desc: POSTING: Security / Mercenary LOCATION: {LagrangeLocation} WORK EXPERIENCE: Combat Pilot (Military Experience a Plus) TERMS*: A recently acquired Shubin Interstellar mining claim awaiting processing was discovered to have been jumped by a rogue mining outfit who are actively stealing ore from the site. While local authorities have been notified, there is concern that valuable assets may be harvested before an official investigation can be launched. Therefore, as is our right as claim holders, we wish to secure a mercenary force to go to {Location} and destroy the several orbital sentries that are protecting this illegal operation. Caution is advised as there may still be a few illegal miners at the location along with any reinforcements they muster. *Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

missions.title: good help’s hard to find
missions.desc: I know someone who’s looking to start up a new business, but they’re having a hard time hiring the skilled workers they need. Now the thing is, they found the perfect crew over at {Address}, but the people they work for won’t let them go. Even hired extra armed guards to make sure of it. What I want you to do, is go there and kill all the guards while making sure all the workers remain unharmed.

missions.title: grab and go
missions.desc: This one should be a ringer for somebody like you. There’s a package being held at {Address} and I need you to bring it to {Address}. There's one super tiny issue that you should know about. There’s gonna be a crap ton of security down there. But I'm sure it should be fine. :)

missions.title: Hack Prevent
missions.desc: {HackPreventDescription}

missions.title: inventory clear out
missions.desc: A client of mine‘s trying to negotiate a deal, but isn’t having much luck. The other party feels like they got all the leverage because they’re sitting comfortably on a pile of inventory. To help move the negotiations along, I’m gonna need you to head down to {Address} and destroy all the drugs on site. Now, I should probably tell you that the site’s being protected by some very serious people, so getting to the stash is going to be a bit tricky, but I trust you’ll find a way.

missions.title: limited supply
missions.desc: Seems there’s a new upstart in the sector who hasn’t been paying the right dues to the right people. To teach them a little lesson, my client wants you to go down to {Address} and destroy all the drugs on site. The low-level lugs they got on site will probably make a stink about it and try to stop you. Handle them however you want but getting rid of the product is the most important thing.

missions.title: live and let an independent contractor deal out revenge
missions.desc: Everybody holds grudges, right? I mean, when you get popped pulling a crime, I get that you’re a little sour, but that’s pretty much the game, right?

variants.title: live and let an independent contractor deal out revenge
live and let an independent contractor deal out revenge
live and let an independent contractor deal out revenge
live and let an independent contractor deal out revenge

missions.title: makin’ a mess
missions.desc: This is a bit aggressive for my taste, but credits are credits, right? Got a client who's looking for a highly motivated individual to head over to {Address} and kill everyone who’s there. Basically, start shooting and don’t stop. You'll get paid once the site's clear.

missions.title: Multiple Deliveries Ready
missions.desc: Hey, Guess there was a technical glitch with our system that marked certain packages as delivered when they never were. Still untangling the mess, but have a few sorted out and good to go. - Package <EM4>#{serialnumber}</EM4> goes from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. - Package <EM4>#{serialnumber}</EM4> goes from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. - Package <EM4>#{serialnumber}</EM4> goes from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. - Package <EM4>#{serialnumber}</EM4> goes from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. - Package <EM4>#{serialnumber}</EM4> goes from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. Would be good to get these rectified immediately if you’re available. Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. Best, Lima Endicott Lead Dispatcher Citizens for Prosperity

missions.title: Opportunity for Independent Cargo Hauler
missions.desc: Earning such accolades as 'Imperial Finances' Top 10 Shipping Companies' and 'Delivery Digest's 2945's Most Trusted Transport,' Covalex is busier than ever. And that means more cargo going to more places. That's where you come in. Covalex is looking for dependable and industrious pilots to join our expanding family. Do you have access to a ship that can hold <EM4>{MissionMaxSCUSize} cargo containers</EM4>? Can you pass an Advocacy background check if required? Then a universe of opportunity is waiting for you. Simply complete an 'Evaluation Trial’ by picking up a shipment of <EM4>{Item}</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>{Address}</EM4> and successfully delivering it to a freight elevator at <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. Upon satisfactory completion, you'll be eligible to become part of Covalex Shipping's vast network of independent transport specialists*. By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along. Covalex Shipping 'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' *Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

missions.title: Oust Claimjumpers
missions.desc: POSTING: Security / Mercenary LOCATION: {LagrangeLocation} WORK EXPERIENCE: Combat Pilot (Military Experience a Plus) TERMS*: A local Stanton independent mining team was working {Location} as Shubin Interstellar contractors when a hostile force attacked and took over the site. We believe that the perpetrators are still at the claim using the equipment left behind to harvest the valuable ore there for themselves. Among the equipment lost were a handful of orbital sentries that had unfortunately not yet been fully deployed at the time of the attack. Long range scans of the claim have led us to conclude that the outlaws have activated the orbital sentries and are using them to protect their illegal operations. To reclaim the site, we are seeking contractors to go to {Location}, destroy the orbital sentries, and clear the site of hostile miners. Efficiency is strongly recommended as there is a high risk they will call for reinforcements once they discover they’re being evicted. *Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

missions.title: Price of Business
missions.desc: Not sure if you’d had the pleasure of dealing with the Rough & Ready, but the gang is laser focused on cornering the fuel market in Pyro. Smart play, but one we can’t let happen without them providing us some concessions. Since they’re currently not interested in negotiating, we’re forced to show them what happens to those who oppose us. We’ve identified {Address} as a prime target for such an attack. We also know they recently received some supplies that should be a fitting price for their obstinance. Once inside the station, do whatever you need to do to confiscate the {item}. We’ll send payment once you’ve delivered them to {Address}. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Remove Claimjumpers
missions.desc: POSTING: Security / Mercenary LOCATION: {LagrangeLocation} WORK EXPERIENCE: Combat Pilot (Military Experience a Plus) TERMS*: We just received word that a Shubin contractor was chased off one of our claims by outlaws who are operating there illegally. Further complicating matters, they have set up a few orbital sentries to protect themselves while they mine. Our hope is to contract with a mercenary who can search for and destroy the sentries at {location}. If you do encounter an illegal miner at the site, be mindful that it is common practice for these types to contact reinforcements for assistance. It might be better to neutralize them as quickly as possible before they can do so. *Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

missions.title: Remove Illegal Occupants
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented security professional who can quickly and safely assist us in the complete removal of illegal occupants who have temporarily gained control of {Address}. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Remove all illegal occupants found within the site; using force as necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques.

missions.title: Repossess Supplies
missions.desc: As much as XenoThreat has strived to make Pyro a pure haven for Humans, not everyone is aligned with our goals. Chief among them is the Headhunters, who have debased themselves by hiring an alien hauler to deliver supplies to them. We missed the chance to hit that shipment, but still want to send the message that working with aliens in any capacity will not be tolerated in this system. That shipment was delivered to {Address}. We want someone to hit the outpost, claim the {item}, and take it to {Address} so we can properly dispose of it. You up for keeping Pyro free from alien influence? Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Steal Subsidies
missions.desc: Leave it to the lying UEE to say they’re not involved with the operations of Citizens for Prosperity simply because they “donate” supplies to a tertiary aid organization who then immediately delivers it right to them. We just got word that one of these government aid shipments was dropped off at a Citizens for Prosperity aligned outpost. That’s why we’ll pay you to raid {Address} and claim the {item} for the cause. Once you deliver everything to {Address} we can redistribute the shipment to help in our fight. Nothing better than using the enemies resources against them. But don’t think they’ll just hand the stuff over to you. Even though Citizens for Prosperity are supposedly here to bring peace, you best be prepared to go toe to toe with ‘em. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Stolen Supplies
missions.desc: Hey, We could use your help. A local we work with was completing a delivery for us, but unfortunately, she ran into some outlaws and had to surrender her {Item}. Silver lining is the outlaws didn’t notice the trackers we placed in the cargo and now we know they’ve taken their haul to {Address}. We’d like you to recover the packages for us and finish delivering them to {Address}. I don’t imagine the outlaws will give them up willingly, but I wouldn’t ask you to put yourself in harm’s way if these supplies weren’t of critical importance. Also, to make your life easier, I'd suggest you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. So, what do you say? Lima Endicott Lead Dispatcher Citizens for Prosperity

missions.title: Theft Outpost Pyro HH vs XT

Theft Outpost Pyro HH vs XT Pyro1
Theft Outpost Pyro HH vs XT Pyro2
Theft Outpost Pyro HH vs XT Pyro3

missions.title: too many cooks
missions.desc: A client is getting out produced by a new competitor and is looking to throw a wrench into the works. You’re going to head to {Address} and kill all the civies who work there. Do what you want with the gun-toting goons guarding the workers, but remember that they aren’t the priority.

missions.title: Tutorial - Your First Flight
missions.desc: You’re almost through with the tutorial. All that remains is to take flight! With your business in {Name} finished, it’s time to leave the city – and eventually the planet. Make your way to the {TransitNameShort} transit shuttles. These shuttles can take you all around {Name} – but your destination is the spaceport, where an Anvil C8 Pisces has been temporarily provided for you. This snub scouting ship is a great starter vessel, perfect for new pilots looking to get their wings.

missions.title: Tutorial - Your First Outing
missions.desc: Well done! With the first part behind you, you should now have some basic familiarity with the movement controls, managing your hunger and thirst, and some of the core functionality of your mobiGlas – namely the Contract Manager and your Journal. This next section will help you familiarize yourself with {Name} and take you to visit {StoreName}, a weapons store here in {Name}. You can shop there, and at other stores like it, using United Earth Credits (UEC). During the Alpha phase of Star Citizen’s development, we will be using a currency called aUEC (Alpha United Earth Credits). This is a temporary currency specifically designed for testing the in-game economy and balance.

missions.title: Tutorial - Your First Steps
missions.desc: Congratulations on taking your first steps into the universe! Over the course of this tutorial, you’ll learn how to get around both on foot and in space. First up is helping you familiarize yourself with some basic movement controls and the use of your mobiGlas while still inside your “Hab” (or habitation). Follow the objectives and hints on your HUD (heads-up display) to proceed through this mission.

missions.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: {TargetName} (?RT)
missions.desc: ATTN: Bounty Hunters Got a bounty that needs to be collected on {TargetName}. The bastard is hiding over at {Address} with a bunch of other scum, so be careful going in. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: {ship} clean up
missions.desc: Got a particular salvage job that we could use some extra hands on. We need you to find a {ship} that got punched out around {location}. Security’s already searching for it and if they find it, they’ll ID it for sure and we’ll be in loads of trouble. So, we want you to make sure that can’t happen. Either tow the ship out of the search area or rip the entire hull off so nobody can tell who it belonged to. Whatever you decide, keep your mouth shut about this. We’ll cred you up and anything you scrap is yours to keep. But if security finds the ship before you’re done, we’ll all be screwed and you won’t get paid so don’t disappoint.

missions.title: {TargetName} Vanished
missions.desc: I’ve got people left and right askin’ me if I know what happened to {TargetName}. Now personally, I’d be more than happy to see ‘em gone for good, but for whatever reason they got friends in high places demanding answers. I can’t spare any of my people to go on a wild goose chase, so I'm looking for the perfect candidate to go over to {Address} and find out what happened to {Last}. You’ll get paid if you find where they are. 10 credits says they got way too high and passed out in a dark corner somewhere. -Smokey

missions.title: {Title} ({Item})
missions.desc: {Description}

missions.title: A Swift Reprisal
missions.desc: Hey, Some two-bit thugs are holed up in {Address}. Wouldn’t pay them any mind, except the arrogant skags tried to hit an outpost under our protection. We chased 'em off with little trouble, but we can't let that kind of disrespect go unpunished. Our Clips are busy with some bigger fish, so we'd like you to take care of this for us. Stows out.

missions.title: Aid The Blockade
missions.desc: Now that Crusader’s found their fleet, it seems the Nine Tails finally realized just how useful a bit of extra help can be. Long story short, they’re looking for some hired muscle to keep Crusader at bay. You’ll and everyone else who volunteers get a payout for every security ship you take down. And on top of that, if all of you keep Crusader occupied long enough for the Nine Tails to finish up whatever the hell it is that they’re up to with this quantum blockade, you’ll get a big fat bonus.

missions.title: Annihilate Sentries
missions.desc: Recent scans discovered several orbital sentries and ships at {address}. We believe they’re part of an espionage campaign targeting XenoThreat, in response to our recent actions in the Stanton system. Seems XenoThreat must be doing something right, if they’re out here spying like this. We’re looking for an experienced and highly-skilled merc willing to eliminate this operation. If you don’t want Pyro to become a surveillance system, then this is your chance to stop it. The sentries probably won’t be too big of an issue, but pay mind to the patrol ships. If they manage to break away, you’ll have a whole lot more trouble breathing down your neck. You’ll have our gratitude and a sizable payment once the job is done. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Assassination
missions.desc: {AssassinationDescription}

missions.title: Away From Prying Eyes
missions.desc: I told the Nine Tails that blocking quantum travel to hold a whole area hostage was gonna attract the wrong kind of attention, but do they listen to me? No. Now Crusader’s got dozens of scanning ships out there poking their noses into things I’d rather stay hidden. That’s why I'm trying to hire as many people as I can to help me out. I wanna pay you for each Crusader scanning ship you take out. In fact, I’ll even up your rate per-ship if all of you hit a certain number of kills. Call it a performance incentive. And if you're really feeling like an overachiever, take out any fools brave enough to try running cargo to the blockaded station. I've got some suppliers who'll be appreciative of the extra demand.

missions.desc: {BountyDescription}

missions.title: Clear Criminal Nest
missions.desc: Crusader Security has learned that {Address} is currently being used as a base of operations for numerous illegal activities. In order to put a stop to this "nest of criminals," we are seeking a contractor to go to the site and clear all the occupants. By force if necessary. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Collection Notice
missions.desc: {TargetName} borrowed a bunch of creds from the Headhunters and thought the smart move was to try and hide instead of paying us back, so I need someone to make an example of {Last}. They were just spotted at {Address}, so I’d recommend heading there now before the trail goes cold. {Last} is a paranoid sort, so don’t be surprised if they’re not alone. Handle it however you want as long as {Last} is dust when you’re done. Stows out.

missions.title: Combat Assistance - HIGH THREAT
missions.desc: [HIGH THREAT] ~serviceBeacon(InitiatorName) is requesting combat assistance in deep space. If accepted, you will be paid ~serviceBeacon(PaymentAmount) aUEC upon elimination of the threat. Distance to ~serviceBeacon(InitiatorName) : ~serviceBeacon(DistToInitiator)

missions.title: Combat Assistance - MODERATE THREAT
missions.desc: [MODERATE THREAT] ~serviceBeacon(InitiatorName) is requesting combat assistance in deep space. If accepted, you will be paid ~serviceBeacon(PaymentAmount) aUEC upon elimination of the threat. Distance to ~serviceBeacon(InitiatorName) : ~serviceBeacon(DistToInitiator)

missions.title: Deadbeat
missions.desc: The Headhunters recently loaned credits to {TargetName} under some clear conditions. Specifically, pay us back or we’ll kill you. Wild to think that wasn’t enough of an incentive, but here we are past the payment deadline. Now as much as we like {First}, I need you to make good on our promise. {Last} was last seen at {Address}. Track ‘em down, ghost ‘em, and get paid. It’s as simple as that. Stows out.

missions.title: Double Dealing
missions.desc: Rough & Ready recently provided fueling services for a hauler named {TargetName}, who agreed to deliver their next load of supplies to us as compensation. Well, we just found out that the lying skag sold their latest shipment to a rival gang instead. We’re looking for someone to track down and eliminate {Last} for the double cross. An old friend of mine just spotted the skag at {Address}. Looks like they're loaded with more cargo that’s not coming our way, and traveling with an escort. We’re only paying you to take out the ship, so anything you find aboard is yours to keep. - Smokey

variants.title: Eliminate All Stations Pyro6 L1 No Non Hostiles

missions.title: Eliminate Eavesdroppers
missions.desc: Some numbskull is trying to dig up dirt on the Headhunters. Some orbital sentries were dropped at {address} to spy on us. We’ve also spotted a ship checking on them. Simple proposition for you. Go wipe out the sentries there and we’ll pay you for it. That sound like something you’d be into? As for the ship, you can do whatever you want with it, but if it spots you, don’t be surprised if it tries to go get some back up. That’s just how these things go. Stows out.

missions.title: Eradicate Eavesdroppers
missions.desc: Headhunters are looking for a merc to do a little clean up for us. Found out that someone’s trying to spy on us over at {address}. Can’t let that stand. We need a skilled operator to take care of the orbital sentries they dropped there, and if needed, deal with any of their ships that get in your way. Seems like a decently run op, so hitting it might not be easy but it sure should be fun. Let us know if you’re the right one for the gig. Creds will be transferred once our scans show it’s gone. Stows out.

missions.title: Eradicate Sentries
missions.desc: Do you value Humanity’s freedom? If so, I’m offering you a chance to prove it. Recent scans discovered orbital sentries and patrolling ships at {address}. We believe they’re part of a UEE espionage campaign targeting XenoThreat. It’s important that we stop their intelligence gathering before we launch our next mission. We’re looking for an experienced merc willing to eliminate these forces immediately. The sentries are the priority, but the ships might prove a bigger issue if they’re allowed to escape. You’ll have to evaluate the situation more closely once you’re on site. We could take care of it ourselves, but want to send in a contractor so the scum behind it don’t know who hit them. Payment will be sent promptly upon completion. Plus, the satisfaction of knowing you’re helping a good cause. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Exact Justice
missions.desc: {TargetName} was recently revealed to be a mole for XenoThreat. It all makes sense now because the skav was a major asshole. Unfortunately, they split before we could handle it ourselves. Based on all they learned about our ops, we need ‘em taken out pronto. They see one of us coming and they’ll just run again, but I figured someone like you has a better chance of getting close enough for a killshot. We just got word {Last} was hanging around {Address}. Looks like there’s other ships around protecting ‘em too. Think you got the skill to rid the ‘verse of a traitorous bastard and their bastard friends? Stows out.

missions.title: Exterminate Eavesdroppers
missions.desc: Some idiots think they can blatantly spy on the Headhunters and get away with it. They’ve set up several orbital sentries at {address} and have a few ships patrolling the area. We don’t know who’s behind it but we honestly don’t care. We just need it gone. Let us know if you feel like putting some real brash bastards in their place. We’ll pay you well and deliver the creds the second the job is done. Keep in mind that it’s really only the sentries we care about. The ships they got patrolling are only a concern if they get in your way or if they try to call in some friends to stop you. Stows out.

missions.title: Failed Delivery
missions.desc: My associates and I brokered a deal with a hauler named {TargetName} to deliver supplies to us. Funny thing is the shipment never showed up. They claimed pirates raided their ship and took our supplies, but it turns out that story’s 100% ranta dung. Lying to back out of our deal can’t go unanswered and you’re going to make that message abundantly clear. {Last} was recently seen with an escort at {Address}. As long as you kill {Last}, we don’t care what happens to the cargo they’re hauling. - Smokey

missions.title: Fuel to the Fire
missions.desc: If you’re in the market for some easy credits, I’ve got an offer for you. See, word on the vine is that {address} is operating as a fuel depot. They must not have gotten the memo that the fuel trade in Pyro belongs to Rough & Ready. That’s why you’re going to make your way there and destroy their fuel reserves. They should be easy for you to spot. They’re the large yellow storage tanks dotted around the outpost. Watch out though, there are turret emplacements defending the area, so make sure you’re ready to dodge their shots or blow the guns sky high. I’ll leave it up to you how you handle the demo. Bombs would be my first choice, but I don’t care much as long as the gig gets done. - Smokey

missions.title: Group Bounty
missions.desc: {GroupBountyDescription}

missions.title: Illegal Blockade - Neutralizing Nine Tails Fleet
missions.desc: Crusader Security has confirmed the location of the outlaw Nine Tails fleet responsible and is mobilizing now to end the quantum blockade of {Location}. We are again seeking trained security professionals to join with our emergency response efforts and assist in neutralizing this dangerous threat. Before accepting, please be aware that the Nine Tails are fully expected to offer considerable resistance and that until the blockade is ended, quantum travel will not be possible in the sector. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Director Sasha Rust ID# 122L964G

variants.title: Illegal Blockade - Neutralizing Nine Tails Fleet
Illegal Blockade - Neutralizing Nine Tails Fleet
Illegal Blockade - Neutralizing Nine Tails Fleet

missions.title: Illegal Blockade - Seeking Nine Tails Fleet Responsible
missions.desc: Crusader Security has learned that the criminal organization known as the Nine Tails have set an illegal blockade around {Location} and stopped all incoming and outgoing quantum traffic in the sector. The outlaw fleet must be located, and the blockade terminated. We are urgently requesting any trained security professionals in the system to join Crusader Security forces and protect our scanning ships as they seek out the location of the Nine Tails fleet causing this blockade. Please bear in mind that with quantum travel disabled and numerous hostiles in the area, this should be considered a high-risk operation. Proper equipment and a full tank of fuel is strongly recommended for all pilots joining this emergency response effort. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Director Sasha Rust ID# 122L964G

variants.title: Illegal Blockade - Seeking Nine Tails Fleet Responsible

Illegal Blockade - Seeking Nine Tails Fleet Responsible

missions.title: In the Wake of Disaster
missions.desc: Fortune has shined upon us once again. I’ve just learned of a battle near {Location} that’s just transpired far from the prying eyes of any meddlesome comm arrays, and reinforcements from either of the forces involved have yet to be dispatched. This means that there is a window of opportunity for an enterprising soul to pick the graveyard clean. I’d like to extend this opportunity to all my trusted contacts. Any and all interested parties can have the location… for the right price. Coordinates will be provided once you accept the contract and will remain available until you choose to terminate it. Of course, speed will be of the essence as you will not only face potential competition from other salvagers, but also the looming possibility of reinforcements arriving to survey the battlefield. If you’re still hesitating, just remember, fortune favors the bold. -cd

missions.title: Long Overdue
missions.desc: Rough & Ready have been in business with {TargetName} for years but that relationship has taken a turn for the worse. For a while, we were supplying them with fuel on credit but when it came time to collect the coward went into hiding. If {Last} can’t pay with creds, guess they’re gonna pay with their life. An associate just clocked {Last} at {Address}. I’d love for you to head there now to make the stingy bastard pay. By the way, it looks like {Last} isn’t traveling alone, so I’d make sure you’re fully stocked before going after ‘em. - Smokey

missions.title: Missing Person Pyro RR Pyro2 Danger

variants.title: Missing Person Pyro RR Pyro2 Danger
Missing Person Pyro RR Pyro3 Danger
Missing Person Pyro RR Pyro1 Danger

missions.title: Overdrive Initiative: PRIORITY TARGETS
missions.desc: Our analysts have examined the intel seized from those XenoThreat recon teams but the data appears to be locked behind a sophisticated encryption system and requires a custom cryptokey to access. We've managed to locate several XenoThreat lieutenants operating in the system, you are to find and engage the suspects and see if they are in possession of a cryptokey that will allows us to access the intel. As a reminder, the military has generously donated some old F7A Hornets for CDF members who see this initiative through to the end.

missions.title: Overdrive Initiative: XENOTHREAT SURVEILLANCE
missions.desc: One of the suspects captured during the recent attacks revealed that XenoThreat is looking to remotely access a number of comm arrays around the system. Having XenoThreat listening into comms is extremely dangerous for the people living here, so the CDF has been enlisted to reset the comm array, then defend it from any XenoThreat Vanguards that will attempt to reconnect to the servers. Once those Vanguards have been defeated, clear out any remaining hostile ships in the area. As a reminder, the military has generously donated some old F7A Hornets for CDF members who see this initiative through to the end.

missions.title: Parting Gift
missions.desc: I have a delicate situation that needs handling. After years of being a loyal member of Rough & Ready, {TargetName} defected from the gang and is out there shopping secrets to our rivals. We need {Last} ghosted immediately. With stuff like this, I’ve found it’s always better to pay someone unassociated with us to do the deed. Scans picked up {Last} near {Address} not too long ago. We’ll pay you well to head there now and take care ‘em for us. {Last} isn’t an idiot and knows we’ll be coming after ‘em. Be prepared for a helluva fight and don’t expect ‘em to be alone. - Smokey

missions.title: Past Due
missions.desc: Time is up for {TargetName}. The skav is way past due on paying back the Headhunters, so I need you to punch them out. Kill ‘em, not hit ‘em, just in case that’s unclear. Someone recently spotted {Last} around {Address}, so head there and take ‘em out. Full disclosure, we’ve gotten reports they used some of our creds to hire extra protection. Prepare accordingly. Stows out.

missions.title: Payback
missions.desc: XenoThreat recently hit a Headhunters' stronghold. I’ll spare you the details, but they did some truly heinous shit to our crew. We’ve identified the leader of the op as {TargetName} and are looking for a little payback. We don’t care what you do to get the job done. Only that {Last} is dead. A source just told us that you can track down this XenoThreat scum over at {Address}. This sicko’s a pro and never travels alone, so don’t expect taking them out to be a walk in the park. Stows out.

missions.title: Preemptive Strike
missions.desc: Headhunters got word there’s a XenoThreat op in the works that's targeting one of our crews. We don’t have precise details about the plan but we know that {TargetName} is organizing it. Instead of sitting back and waiting for something to happen, we’ve decided to be proactive. {Last} was just spotted with others around {Address}. We can’t mobilize anyone fast enough to get there. I want you to rush there and deliver a preemptive strike. Stows out.

missions.title: Pro Tem Group Warrant Contract
missions.desc: Hey, Hope everything is going all right. I may have reached out already, but I wanted to be sure and introduce myself. I'm a logistics officer for Northrock Service Group, the leading independently-owned security firm operating in the Stanton system today, providing a variety of services to all major governmental bodies as well as various private concerns. The reason I am contacting you is because we believe someone with your skills could be a boon to our clients. Not only that, but I think we'd be good fit for you. Our contractors traditionally get a higher rate of pay than a lot of our competitors in system, and a lot of them tell me how they really enjoy being tasked with the challenging and interesting work we offer. Now, Northrock holds itself to such high-standards so before we can make anything official, you'll need to achieve approved contractor status by completing a pro tem contract. I was hoping you could capture several wanted members of an outlaw gang: {Target1}, {Target2}, and {Target3}. Get that done and we'll see about getting you more work. Hope to hear from you soon, Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

missions.title: Red Wind Package Handler
missions.desc: RED WIND LINEHAUL 'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS' ---------------------------- Got some boxes that need reorganizing over at <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Pickup1}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Pickup2}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Pickup3}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Pickup4}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Dropoff1}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Dropoff2}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Dropoff3}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Dropoff4}</EM4> TO ALL VETS - Red Wind appreciates your service to our Empire! Your struggles mean our freedom!

missions.title: Silence Sentries
missions.desc: Our resistance movement is growing by the day, but that comes with some unwanted attention. Recent scans discovered orbital sentries at {address} and a ship running a patrol pattern. We believe this is part of an espionage campaign targeting XenoThreat, most likely funded by the UEE. We’re looking for an experienced merc willing to destroy the sentries ASAP. Since they already have eyes and ears on us, sending in someone from outside the org would draw less attention. If you take the gig, you’ll be paid promptly once the sentries are destroyed. Now, while the patrol ship isn’t the main target, we suspect that if it escapes it might have reinforcements in reserve. Might be smart to deal with it promptly. If you decide to help us, XenoThreat will remember you’re someone willing to fight for what’s right. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Silence Spying Op
missions.desc: The Rough & Ready crew is looking for someone to handle a delicate situation. We’ve discovered a ship and orbital sentries at {address} spyin’ on us. We’re in a bit of a bind because we don’t want to start a larger fight with whoever’s behind this. That’s why we’re looking for some hired help who can quickly and discreetly take care of it for us. Interested? Last thing, once you’re out there, make sure to keep an eye on that ship. Bet as soon as you start blowin’ up their sentries they’re gonna try to bring in some help to stop you. - Smokey

missions.title: Squash Spying Op
missions.desc: Recently made an interesting discovery that someone set up a handful of orbital sentries at {address}. Guess they’re trying to grab some info about our operations there. They even have a few ships guarding to make sure nothing happens to them. Of course, we want these bastards gone, but I’m worried that getting rid of it ourselves would be bad for business. That’s why we’re looking for a little ‘plausible deniability’. Someone from outside of R&R to eliminate the problem, so whoever is behind it can’t directly tie the attack back to us. I know this won’t be a walk in the park, especially with those guards lurking. Who knows how many reinforcements they have at the ready? But if you manage to get it done, we’re prepared to see you paid right. Think you’ve got the skills to pull this off? - Smokey

missions.title: Station Waste Disposal Unlawful Stanton3
missions.desc: {Description}

missions.title: Stomp Spying Op
missions.desc: The Rough & Ready crew is looking for an independent merc interested in something heavy. We’ve been keeping an eye on a developing situation at {address} where ships are guarding several orbital sentries spying on our operations. Now, I might’ve been born at night, but it wasn’t last night. Considering the blatant way they’re set up, whoever’s responsible had to know we’d eventually discover it. Almost feels like they’re baiting R&R into attacking it, and I don’t want us falling for it. Instead, you’re gonna do it for us and get paid a damn good amount of creds for your effort. The ships stationed there will be less suspicious of an unaffiliated ship approaching and make it harder to pin the attack on us. Just be sure to plan accordingly before heading in. Maybe bring your own reinforcements in case any of their ships escape and call in some of their own. - Smokey

missions.title: Strike Saboteur
missions.desc: Interested in doing a little hunting? {TargetName} sabotaged one of our fuel shipments and cost us a ton of creds, so I’m looking for someone to make ‘em pay for what they did. Just got word {Last} was spotted at {Address}. If you head there now, there’s a good chance you can pick up their trail and take ‘em out for good. {Last} didn’t work alone, so don’t be surprised if they’re traveling with extra protection. - Smokey

missions.title: Track Down Gang Member
missions.desc: XenoThreat has placed a kill order on {TargetName}. As a Clips level member of the Headhunters gang, {Last} has led operations that have targeted XenoThreat operatives, missions, and infrastructure. For these transgressions, XenoThreat will pay anyone who successfully tracks down and assassinates {Last}. LOCATION UPDATE: {Last} was seen near {Address} not too long ago. If you decide to accept this contract, you should head to the coordinates immediately. {Last} knows we’re looking for ‘em and has been traveling with an escort recently. Don’t be surprised if they’re not alone. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Track Down Spy
missions.desc: XenoThreat has placed a kill order on the head of {TargetName}. As a member of the Headhunters gang, {Last} hacked into XenoThreat systems to steal information on our operations and personnel. The harm done can only be rectified by ensuring {Last} can never do something like this again. That’s why XenoThreat will pay anyone who can track down and assassinate {Last}. LOCATION UPDATE: Recent scans identified {Last} traveling with other ships near {Address}. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Track Down Traitor
missions.desc: XenoThreat has placed a kill order on {TargetName}. A known member of the Headhunters gang, {Last} has betrayed Humankind by being a known alien ally who associates with them in both a personal and business capacity. XenoThreat wants these traitorous associations stopped immediately before they bring more alien influence to Pyro. We’ll pay anyone who successfully tracks down and assassinates {Last} for these crimes against Humanity. LOCATION UPDATE: {Last} was recently spotted with an escort at {Address}. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Trigger A Trap
missions.desc: Some asshole going by the name {TargetName} has been running a scheme where their cargo ship requests refueling services only to ambush our ships when they get there. Even loaded the damn thing up with real cargo to make sure it passes scans. We’ve spread the word so nobody in Rough & Ready will fall for the trap again, but I want this skag punished. I think {Last} knows a lot of our people on sight, so I’m guessing it’ll be better to pay you to take care of it. Heard that they were spotted around {Address}. Head there now and take care of that cargo ship and anyone protecting it once and for all. - Smokey

missions.title: UDM Package Handler
missions.desc: Greetings Qualified Package Handler! Ready to tackle a challenging yet rewarding job in a shipping adjacent compacity? Then we have a perfect opportunity for you at <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Pickup1}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Pickup2}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Pickup3}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Pickup4}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Dropoff1}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Dropoff2}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Dropoff3}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Dropoff4}</EM4> So pick up that contract and let's get to work. Looking forward to working with you, Unified Distribution Management -Delivering the Total Package-

missions.title: A Chance to Impress
missions.desc: Firstly, allow me to introduce myself. To put it rather dramatically, I deal in lives. People hire me when some soul needs to be extinguished, and I in return employ the perfect person to serve as the extinguishant. This provides security to all parties involved as none know the identity of the other. An ideal situation as far as these things go. I was recently made aware that you may possess skills that would make you of service to me and decided that it would be worthwhile to pursue the validity of this claim. If you have any interest in forging a working relationship, I will need a demonstration of said skills. Seek out and discreetly kill {TargetName} over at {Address}. Do so successfully and you will be rewarded. Not only that, but you will have proven yourself worthy of further consideration. Sincerely, Vaughn

missions.title: Active Bounty: {TargetName} (HRT)
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend the high-risk target {TargetName} from {Address}. A high-risk target typically pilots a large multicrew vessel, has several known allies, and is expected to be difficult to apprehend. It may be useful to bring along support staff to assist with engaging this target. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Neutralize {TargetName}; using force as necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • Bounty Hunters Guild membership and appropriate certification. • Access to vehicle suitably outfitted for combat. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Ability to handle high pressure situations.

missions.title: Apprehend Bounty: {TargetName} (HRT)
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend {TargetName} who has so far been able to evade capture. They are coordinating an active raid at {Address}, and we believe that they may finally be lured out of hiding if their forces there attacking the {Location} are faced with strong enough resistance. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Neutralize {TargetName}’s criminal associates near the {Location} to draw the target into the open. • Neutralize {TargetName}; using force if necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Ability to handle high pressure situations.

missions.title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Les Arlington
missions.desc: ECKHART SECURITY, LLC. CONTRACTS & DISPATCH CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent Approval code: = {ApprovalCode} FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING ********* __Background Information__ A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington. ********* An anonymous comm has tipped us off that Les Arlington, child of gang leader Maltrox Arlington, had been spotted picking up a delivery at a Covalex transfer center. We will provide you with the coordinates of where we believe their current whereabouts are. Les is an experienced pilot who has been flying for almost as long as they’ve been walking and usually serves as the gang’s get-away pilot. It may be worthwhile to bring extra support ships in order to cut off any attempts at escape. You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. This contract is non-negotiable. This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

missions.title: Clear Out Drugs
missions.desc: ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators We got word that a syndicate spiked a rival’s drug package and its causing chaos on the streets. Forensics have identified the source, a production facility over at {Address}. Word is the drug manufacturers don’t even know they have a poisoned crop on their hands. We’re sorting through how to handle the arrests, but the important thing is to get this crap off the streets now. I need you to get down there and destroy the drugs they’re storing on site. They won’t be happy about it, so you’ll probably have a fight on your hands, but the important thing is clearing out the product. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Clear Out Site
missions.desc: ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators We’ve gotten word that {Address} is being used by some local criminals as a base of operations. BlacJac needs the site swept and any inhabitants cleared out of there. You are authorized to use lethal force if necessary. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Clear Site of Drugs
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary or security professional to report to {Address} and destroy the drugs being stored there. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Clear the site of drugs; using force as necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • No ongoing addiction issues.

missions.title: Demolition Mission
missions.desc: I’m looking to send a strong message to the crew over at {Address} and know the perfect way to do it - property damage. All you need to do is head on over, destroy a few things here and there, and really drive home an important lesson about respecting your betters. Do that for me and I’ll be feeling very happy. And generous. Interested?

missions.title: Destroy Toxic Narcotics
missions.desc: We’ve been investigating a recent bout of OD’s and they all seem to have originated with a bad batch of drugs made over at {Address}. I’m working with other contractors to ferret out those responsible, but people are dying as long is the product is still out there. I want you to go the site and destroy the stash they have there. Should buy us some time before we shut them down for good. They will have guards protecting their supply, so be prepared to engage with hostiles. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Eliminate Drug Stash
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Contraband Elimination CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent OUTSOURCE MANAGER: R. Russel RISK ASSESSMENT: High RUSH CONTRACT: No Local criminals have been identified using {Address} to manufacture large quantities of illegal. Hurston Security requires a contractor to go to the facility and eliminate all contraband being stored there. Payment will be sent once all the contraband is eliminated. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Eliminate XenoThreat Idris
missions.desc: Hey, The rumors are true. XenoThreat has deployed an Idris to stalk and attack Citizens for Prosperity operations in a dramatic escalation of their hostility towards us. We just received word the ship, under the command of {TargetName}, is advancing toward {address}. We can’t get our own forces there fast enough to fight them, and are in desperate need of help. We’re looking to hire someone brave enough to take it to these bastards. It’s not enough to scare them away, we need to guarantee that it can’t come after us again. Not sure if you’ve faced down an Idris before, but it’s a tall task for someone to take on alone. I’d highly recommend recruiting others to the cause. Best, Lima Endicott Lead Dispatcher Citizens for Prosperity

missions.title: Eradicate All Nests
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Pest Extermination CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent OUTSOURCE MANAGER: G. Livingston RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium RUSH CONTRACT: No Hurston is seeking a contractor willing to exterminate several nests that have been preventing departments from surveying the relevant caves for resources. We are prepared to offer generous payment for the eradication of these various pests. For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Evict Illegal Occupants
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Facility Sweep CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent OUTSOURCE MANAGER: G. Livingston RISK ASSESSMENT: High RUSH CONTRACT: No Hurston is seeking a contractor willing to clear out the criminal occupants from {Address}. The site has been used to host numerous illegal activities, so it is imperative that it is secured. You are authorized to take any actions necessary. Payment will be sent once the facility is confirmed to be clear. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Idris Stolen By Arlington Gang
missions.desc: ECKHART SECURITY, LLC. CONTRACTS & DISPATCH CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent Approval code: = {ApprovalCode} FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING It appears that second time's the charm for the Arlington gang. After one failed attempt, the recently escaped criminal family has managed to boost an Idris from a repair yard. Now we know what the mining laser and biometrics they stole were for. Since we had such success capturing them the first time, Eckhart Security has been granted the warrant for the gang’s arrest. This is going to take considerable firepower to bring down a capital ship of this ability. You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to track down the Idris and neutralize the gang. Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract and will be adjusted based on the final evaluation of you and your team's combat effectiveness rating. This contract is non-negotiable. This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

missions.title: Missing Person Report: {TargetName}
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING CONTRACT: Locate Missing Individual OUTSOURCE MANAGER: I. Takao RISK ASSESSMENT: Low The staff at {Address} has recently filed a missing persons report for one {TargetName}. They have been missing for several days and were last seen heading to the {Location}. You are being contracted to conduct an onsite search for {Last} and see if you can determine their whereabouts. Payment is dependent on returning a record of their current location, alive or dead. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Neutralize Outlaw Incursion
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING CONTRACT: Neutralize Hostile Force OUTSOURCE MANAGER: T. Dalik RISK ASSESSMENT: High Our security forces have been notified of an ongoing outlaw incursion at {Address}, and we are in need of an independent operator capable of clearing out the hostile actors. According to onsite personnel, the outlaws are currently holed up near the {Location}. Approach with caution and be prepared to use lethal force if the outlaws resist being removed. Sometimes simple is best. -Bit Zeros

missions.desc: We’ve been trying to access some sensitive data over at {Address} but there seems to only be one backdoor we can use. The issue is we need someone onsite to trigger it. And I really do mean trigger it. If you can head over there and destroy part of their infrastructure, the emergency back up systems will kick online and we should be able to access everything we want. Wish I could see the surprise look on the faces of the lowlifes running the place when it happens. -Bit Zeros

missions.title: URGENT: Boarding Action In Progress
missions.desc: An executive client just informed us that their 890 Jump had been intercepted at {Location} and boarded by outlaws. They would prefer to have this handled privately owing to the sensitive nature of proprietary data that's being stored aboard. Your first priority will be to clear all outlaws as quickly as possible so that a recovery team can be dispatched to return the ship to the owner. The longer the outlaws have control of the vessel, the higher the chance it will be lost. I recommend you acquire a team for this outing to expedite matters. Note that thanks to a small contingent of Security Personnel who stayed aboard, all surviving members of the crew were able to flee in an escape craft. The current status of the remaining security is unknown, but just in case, keep an eye out for friendlies when you engage the hostiles. Secondly, if at all possible, the client is *very* interested in preventing the theft of the aforementioned data. If you are able to stop the theft of their confidential data stores before they are transmitted, a generous bonus will be issued. Needless to say, this is a client I would very much like to keep happy. Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation. • Locate the target species on {Location}. • Use force as necessary to eliminate the animals. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 1 year of relevant mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Experience with extermination. For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

missions.title: {TargetName}’s Time Has Come
missions.desc: We’ve had our sights set on taking out {TargetName} for a while now, but we’ve never been able to find the right moment. Enough waiting. You’re going to create the right moment for us. Head to {Address} and take out a bunch of lowlifes running around the {Location}. Kill enough of those losers, and {Last} will have no choice but to come face you themselves. That’s when you take ‘em out and earn yourself a nice fat payday.

missions.title: A Batch from Scratch
missions.desc: Normally, I like to cook everything from scratch myself. Pride in product and all. But every once in a while, whether it's too much demand or too much heat or whatever, I need to rely on other labs for an order. My hands are tied up here though, so I could use someone to help oversee the whole production line for me. Couldn't think of anyone better and more available than you. {Itinerary} Just don't get distracted in the middle and wander off. It happens more often than you'd think. Manage to finish the full list, and I'll see to it you get nice cut of the profits. -Wallace

missions.title: A Mother's Plea
missions.desc: My son Nico was sadly among the victims of the tragic accident at Covelex's Gundo station and they still haven't returned all of his personal possessions to me. I understand that they have to do things according to regulations, but it seems unconscionable that they wouldn't make some allowances for the grieving family members. To that end, I'm seeking someone who will be able to go to the station for me. To be clear, Gundo is currently considered off limits, meaning that this would not be above board, but I feel my situation warrants special consideration. My sister says that the rate I am offering is the correct amount for retrieving the crate with Nico's belongings (#964) and bringing them to {Destination}, so hopefully I can find a competent individual to settle this matter quickly. Sincerely, Gloria Theolone
