missions.title: Breach and Steal
missions.desc: Hey there. Nine Tails got themselves a little problem. As it turns out, they got a little side biz in the underground organ trade. Now that an area I generally like to steer well clear of, but a gig’s a gig, right? It seems that one of their mobile butcher shops aboard the 'October Rising' got pinched by private security while out chopping. Now the Nine Tails are willing to cut ties with the ship and its crew (who are probably all dead anyway), but they need a particular crate extracted. Guess it was a special order or something. Anyway, get aboard the October Rising, get the package, and get out. Security’s still hanging around so watch yourself and maybe bring some friends, but remember, your priority is the package. If you're looking to save yourself some extra hassle, you could also black out the area by shutting down the nearest comm array if you want to avoid the crimestats for, you know, killing a bunch of a security. But hey, you do you. Once you’re out, drop the package off at the clinic on Grim HEX and I’ll sort your payment. Easy peasy, Ruto

missions.title: Capture Arlington Gang Leader Maltrox Arlington
missions.desc: ECKHART SECURITY, LLC. CONTRACTS & DISPATCH CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent Approval code: = {ApprovalCode} FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING ********* __Background Information__ A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington. ********* Maltrox Arlington has been keeping a low profile recently, but we think he's come out of hiding. A patrol was refueling at a station when one of their ships was boosted. Maltrox is the most likely suspect. While the regtag was temporarily deactivated, we have been able to trace the ship’s quantum signature and have provided you those coordinates. A third generation criminal, the Arlington gang has been under Maltrox’s leadership for the past six years. Be aware, this is a smart, aggressive, and very dangerous target. The more resources you can bring to bear, the more likely it is that we can bring Maltrox in one and for all. You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. This contract is non-negotiable. This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

missions.title: CDF ALERT: Attack on XenoThreat
missions.desc: *FOR IMMEDIATE SYSTEM-WIDE RELEASE* Attention, Naval forces have regrouped for a final assault on the XenoThreat outlaw pack that have been plaguing Stanton System. The Navy has officially requested for any CDF volunteers to help provide combat support in this final push to secure our system. SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation.

missions.title: CDF ALERT: Xenothreat Ambush - Support Needed
missions.desc: *FOR IMMEDIATE SYSTEM-WIDE RELEASE* Attention, XenoThreat forces started to ambush Naval convoy ships transporting vital supplies while en route to Jericho station at the Pyro Gateway in the Stanton System. The Navy has requested CDF forces to help recover these supplies from the wreckage and safely deliver them to Jericho. The Navy has organized a community stipend to handle the distribution of payment. This will be distributed among all CDF volunteers at assigned intervals. An indicator will appear on your HUD to measure these payouts. Please note that some of these supplies are highly volatile if not handled correctly. Use caution while transporting these materials: * Zeta-Prolanide degrades over time until breaking down completely. * AcryliPlex Composite becomes explosively unstable if damaged. * Diluthermex releases a destructive energy pulse if exposed to quantum travel. Additionally, while not as volatile, the supplies of DynaFlex lost during the attack are still urgently needed by the Navy to complete their repairs of the Javelin and should be a priority for recovery. Also, XenoThreat hostiles might still be in the area so be careful. CDF volunteers with combat experience are also urged to contribute by securing these areas from lingering XenoThreat forces. SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation.

variants.title: CDF ALERT: Xenothreat Ambush - Support Needed

missions.title: Clear Claimjumpers
missions.desc: POSTING: Security / Mercenary LOCATION: {LagrangeLocation} WORK EXPERIENCE: Combat Pilot (Military Experience a Plus) TERMS*: It was recently discovered that a Shubin mining claim has been illegally poached by a rogue miner. While the miner themselves seems to no longer be stealing ore from the site, they did leave behind an orbital sentry which is preventing us from reclaiming it thanks to its offensive capabilities. We are looking for a mercenary willing to travel to {location} hunt down the sentry and destroy it in preparation for Shubin repossession of the site. *Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Clear the site of contraband; using force as necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • No ongoing addiction issues.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • No ongoing addiction issues.

missions.title: Coordinated Takedown
missions.desc: Interesting assignment came my way. I need two separate targets taken out: {TargetName} and {TargetName2} Problem is, either one gets word about the other being hit, they’ll go to ground. Can’t risk losing either of them. It’ll take considerable coordination, but I want you to hit them both at the same exact time. And since you can’t be in two places at once, you’ll need to find someone you can trust to help on this. Thankfully, my intel says that both the targets should be traveling alone. That should help make things a bit easier on you.

missions.title: Covalex Evaluation
missions.desc: Hi there! Covalex is currently on the lookout for new delivery contractors. To see if you're Covalex material or not, we've arranged for the below delivery route as evaluation of your skills. PACKAGE FOR PICK UP · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATION · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to <EM4>{Address}</EM4> Successfully completing this run will certify you as an official Covalex contractor. By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along. {SignOff} Chase Hewitt Jr. Logistics Coordinator Covalex Shipping 'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. By accepting this contract, you are agreeing to all terms and conditions as outlined in our extended 'Independent Workers Supplemental Information Guide v.2948.01.29.' Covalex Shipping is not responsible for any damages that occur while operating as an independent contractor.

missions.title: Covalex Re-evaluation
missions.desc: Hi, Since Covalex has been suffering from an abundance of deliveries and a lack of contractors, I was able to convince administration to reconsider your status. All you have to do is successfully complete the following delivery and you're back in the rotation. PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along. Good luck. It'd be great to have you on the roster again. Chase Hewitt Jr. Logistics Coordinator Covalex Shipping 'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. By accepting this contract, you are agreeing to all terms and conditions as outlined in our extended 'Independent Workers Supplemental Information Guide v.2948.01.29.' Covalex Shipping is not responsible for any damages that occur while operating as an independent contractor.

missions.title: Dangerous Take
missions.desc: I was hopin’ you’d be interested in pulling a little job for us. Got some goods over at {Address} that are just right for the taking. Only problem is – and it’s a big one – the bastards running the place have the whole area rigged with proximity mines. You’ll need to find someway through, or if you can’t be bothered, someway to trigger the lot. Either way, just try not to blow yourself up. Then you just need to grab the stuff and take it over to {Address}. It won’t be easy to pull off, but if you do, I promise I’ll make it worth your while.

missions.title: Deadly Combination
missions.desc: {TargetName} and {TargetName2}. Two serious operators who've recently decided to make a move against their boss. Each of the pair are traveling with a small, highly trained armada and cutting deep into territory that doesn't belong to them. You, and whoever you recruit to help, are going to take them out and it has to be both at the same time so they can't regroup.

missions.title: death do us part
missions.desc: It's pretty touching when you run across a pair that's willing to die for one another. Stupid but touching. {TargetName} and {TargetName2} chose to stand by each other and now its gone and got them dead. Find a friend of your own and hunt each of these two down. Make sure you kill them at the same time. Call it poetic justice. They should die pretty easy. Maybe they'll have a ship or two with them but I don't think it'll be anything to worry about.

missions.title: Defend Location Against Minor Threats
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can assemble a security team in order to protect {Address} against any minor threats. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Provide own security team to assist. • Protect the site against hostile threats; using force as necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Experience with managing a team.

missions.title: Defend Location Against Moderate Threats
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can assemble a security team in order to protect {Address} against hostile threats. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Provide own security team to assist. • Protect the site against hostile threats; using force as necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Experience with managing a team.

missions.title: Defend Location Against Serious Threats
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can assemble a security team in order to protect {Address} against serious hostile threats. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Provide own security team to assist. • Protect the site against hostile threats; using force as necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Experience with managing a team.

missions.title: Defend Occupants
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can quickly and safely assist the security team stationed at {Address} in protecting the site against hostile threats. Be aware that any friendly fire, accidental or otherwise, will not be tolerated. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. • Help the local security team protect the site; using force as necessary. • Avoid any friendly fire incidents. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques.

missions.title: Defend Site From Dangerous Threat
missions.desc: ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators I’ve received a report that some operators are planning on making a move against {Address}. BlacJac wants you to put a team together and defend the site from this dangerous threat. It is strongly recommended that you do not attempt to do this contract solo. Hiring a team of skilled mercenaries to provide support would be the smartest route. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Defend Site From Minor Threat
missions.desc: ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators One of the sites under BlacJac’s purview has been clashing with a few local outlaws. We would like you to head down to {Address} and secure the site from these hostile threats. From the early reports, I expect this will be a fairly straightforward matter, but if it makes you feel better, feel free to recruit a team to provide you with extra support. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Defend Site From Threat
missions.desc: ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators We’ve gotten word that some local muscle have been making threats against {Address}. BlacJac is looking to have you put a team together and protect the site from these hostile threats. And as much as we all love credits, I don’t recommend trying to do this one solo. Hiring a team to come along would be beneficial to your livelihood. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Delicate Dealings
missions.desc: I’m really hoping you’re going to agree to do this since there doesn’t seem to be too many folks eager to take on a whole bunch of proximity mines. See, there’s a score that we’ve sourced at {Address} but the physical security is proving more difficult than expected. If you can find a way to navigate through the mines or possibly a way to trigger them remotely, it should be relatively easy to grab the goods and make your way out of there. Drop them off at {Address} and you’ll get more than your fair cut of the credits for taking on the risk. -Bit Zeros

While we look into how the mistake happened, we need someone to head over to <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to pick up package <EM4>#{serialnumber}</EM4> and deliver it to the correct location at <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. You available for the run? Lima Endicott Lead Dispatcher Citizens for Prosperity

missions.title: Delivery Pilot for Covalex
missions.desc: Hello there, I have a delivery I need taken care of. The order is waiting at <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to be taken to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. I’m sure you’ll be fine, but for full disclosure, I’m seeing a bunch of security warnings pop up for this area. Seems there have been a handful of attacks in that area in the last few days. Now, I’m not saying you’ll run into anything, but it would probably be best if you brought along a bit of protection. Good luck, Chase Hewitt Jr. Logistics Coordinator Covalex Shipping 'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

missions.title: Destroy Blade
missions.desc: {DestroyBladeDescription}

missions.title: Destroy Dangerous Drugs
missions.desc: ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators Some enterprising chemists have cooked up a new product that is twice as potent and twice as deadly as the normal stuff. We were able to trace some samples back to the source over at {Address}. BlacJac wants you to head down ASAP to destroy the entire batch before it can hurt any more of the population. We can worry about making arrests later. From everything we know about this crew, you should expect to meet heavy resistance while attempting to clear out the stash. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Destroy Deadly Contraband
missions.desc: A fledgling syndicate have set up shop over at {Address} and have been trying their hand at cracking into the drug market. Unfortunately, their product has been linked to several deaths in and around Crusader. With how potent this stuff is, it’s posing a serious threat to the public. Crusader is working to take down the whole operation, but as long as their product is circulating, the bodies are starting to pile up. We want you to go the site and destroy the stash they have there before they get a chance to sell it. However, you should expect their stash to be extremely well guarded. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Destroy Illegal Drugs
missions.desc: We’ve discovered that a group is trying to start up their own drug business over at {Address}. While they seem to be your average low-level thugs, the product they’re producing is toxic and responsible for the deaths of multiple civilians, so we can’t afford to allow any more to be sold. We’re are working on a larger operation that will shut them down for good, but in the meanwhile we need to stop the flow of their drugs. That’s why Crusader wants you to go the site and destroy the stash they have there. They will undoubtedly have guards protecting the stash, but I don’t expect them to be too much of a threat. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Divide and Conquer
missions.desc: Normally, the pair of {TargetName} and {TargetName2} would be too much to take on together. They both are about as good as it gets when it comes to dogfighting and the crew they fly with are almost as good. But recently they split - not sure why - and are flying separate for the moment. Someone thinks this may be the best chance to take them out. Gather some personnel you can trust and plan a simultaneous raid against both targets. It's too dangerous to risk one of them living after such a direct move against them.

missions.title: Double Elimination
missions.desc: Got a contract to take out two up and comers who've been stirring up trouble. It has to be clean, both done at the same time, or else they might cause even more trouble. Long story short, you'll need some help on this one. Both {TargetName} and {TargetName2} know how to handle themselves, and the people they fly with aren't no joke either. You can expect each of them to be guarded by a few ships.

missions.title: Double Tap
missions.desc: A price has been set on the heads of {TargetName} and {TargetName2}. While having to hit two targets isn't that weird, the client wants to send a very specific message, so they need to targets hit at the exact same moment. The extra credits should make up for the hassle. And unfortunately since the pair aren't traveling together, it goes without saying that to pull it off you're gonna need some help. Make sure you bring people you trust can handle more than one ships since the targets are known to travel with backup.

missions.title: double trouble
missions.desc: If you had asked me, I would've said {TargetName} and {TargetName2} would have wound up eventually killing each other. But instead you're going to get the honor of killing them both at the same time. You're going to have to work for it, though. Each one is trouble. Serious records, highly trained, and too smart to fly without backup. Gather the best crew you can on this one. You'll need it. And don't be stingy. You can't spend credits if you're dead.

missions.desc: {Description}

missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Contraband Elimination CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent OUTSOURCE MANAGER: R. Russel RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium RUSH CONTRACT: No Local thugs have been using {Address} to manufacture large quantities of contraband. Hurston Security requires a contractor to go to the facility and destroy all contraband being stored there. Payment will be sent once all the contraband is eliminated. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

Hurston Security is seeking a contractor to go to the facility and eliminate all the contraband being stored there. Payment will be sent once all the contraband is eliminated. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Elusive Bounty: {TargetName} (HRT)
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING CONTRACT: Bounty Collection OUTSOURCE MANAGER: I. Takao RISK ASSESSMENT: High Risk Target (Armed Support) Hurston Dynamics is seeking a contractor to complete a bounty for {TargetName}. This bounty has proven extremely elusive so far, but intel reports have tracked the target and a cohort of their known associates to {Address}. However, there is a strong chance that {Last} will not risk a confrontation unless absolutely forced to. It is our recommendation that you neutralize a significant portion of the criminal’s allies first in order to draw them out. The report indicates that a large party of these hostiles are currently near the {Location}. Payment will be released only after the bounty has been deemed complete. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: End Nine Tails' Occupation at Orison
missions.desc: *FOR IMMEDIATE SYSTEM-WIDE RELEASE* Attention, Nine Tails forces have seized control of several commercial platforms near Orison. Using an Identity Friend or Foe Inverter (IFFI), they have taken over the restricted air space surrounding the platforms and only Nine Tails affiliated ships can gain access to the area. This has severely hampered Crusader Security's initial attempts at retaking the platforms. As such, Crusader has requested that CDF forces assist in shutting down the inverter and eliminating all hostile presence. Any available CDF volunteers are encouraged to provide support. Additional Intel: * While the inverter is active and the airspace inaccessible, CDF has managed to gain control of a local shuttle system and route it to access Solanki Platform without the Nine Tails knowledge. Volunteers will need to head to the Crusader Industries Showroom on the Commercial Platform and get to the rooftop to find the shuttle that will travel to the occupied platforms. * The IFFI is believed to be located in a locked storage container on a cargo barge docked at the central Admin Center. * Access codes for the IFFI container are in the possession of the leader of the Nine Tails forces, Mendo Ren. * Past experience with Mendo Ren indicates that he is unlikely to show his face and risk capture. However, if all his lieutenants are neutralized, we believe he will have no choice but to take command of the forces in person and provide us the opportunity to retrieve the codes from him. * In addition to the shuttle system, Crusader Security has informed us that there are several vehicles on the platforms available for CDF to commandeer. These vehicles will be the only way of reaching the Admin Center. NOTE - If all of the vehicles within the restricted air space are destroyed before the inverter can be shut down, then there will be no way of reaching the cargo barge and the CDF will be forced to retreat. * The platforms are protected by Nine Tails controlled Anti-Air weapons. Please be aware that SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation.

variants.title: End Nine Tails' Occupation at Orison

missions.title: Escapee Bounty Assignment: {TargetName}
missions.desc: Convicted criminal {TargetName} has escaped from a local rehab facility and Northrock's been contracted to return the inmate to custody. In my experience, escaped prisoners tend not to give up peacefully, so use any method you can to find and subdue the escapee. Might be worth staking out spots where they could attempt to hack their record clean. Wouldn't be the first time a prisoner has tried to wipe their sentence after escaping. Good hunting, Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

missions.title: Escort
missions.desc: {InitiatorName} is requesting an escort at the location: {InitiatorLocation}. If accepted, you will be paid {PaymentAmount} aUEC/Minute until CANCELLED by the Initiator or ABANDONED by the Service Provider. NOTE: Contract and payment will begin once you rendezvous with the Client.

missions.title: Escort

missions.title: Evasive Bounty: {TargetName} (VHRT)
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING CONTRACT: Bounty Collection OUTSOURCE MANAGER: I. Takao RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High Risk Target (Armed Support) Hurston Dynamics is seeking a contractor to complete a bounty for {TargetName}. This target and the large hostile force they are traveling with have just been reported raiding {Address}. However, if their MO holds true, {Last} has typically remained hidden during attacks, preferring to direct their forces from afar. It is our recommendation that you focus on thinning out their allies first, and once their numbers have been significantly weakened, {Last} will have no choice but to confront you directly. Payment will be released only after the bounty has been deemed complete. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Exterminate Nest of {Creature}
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Pest Extermination CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent OUTSOURCE MANAGER: G. Livingston RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium RUSH CONTRACT: No Hurston is seeking a contractor willing to exterminate {Creature} that have taken up residence inside {address}. They have become an issue, and we need a professional to resolve the situation. Payment will be sent once the nest has been eliminated. For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Failed Negotiations
missions.desc: Ran into a bit of crap luck that I'm hoping you can help me right. A few days ago, I hired the crew of the 'Pride of Arliss' to obtain some important data for me. They pulled off the job no problem, but the bastard of a captain comm'd me demanding more credits. Turns out it wasn't the first time he's tried to pull this trick either because in middle of "negotiating" with me, his ship was attacked by some very pissed off individuals looking to teach him a lesson. Our comm got cut off when the shooting started and that was the last I heard from him. I'm guessing he's as good as ghosted, but I want you to head to the Pride of Arliss and try to get my data off the captain's personal datapad. Once you have it, I set up a secure transmission channel at the ARC-L1 rest stop. Travel there and when you're in range, submit the data to me through this contract to get paid. Don’t try to screw me over either. Karma can be a real asshole.

missions.title: Fight for a Free Pyro
missions.desc: XenoThreat’s efforts to keep outside influences from infecting this system is being tested by a group that dares to call itself Citizens for Prosperity. A prominent group member, {TargetName}, has established operations at {Address} and is already hard at work spreading their lies and propaganda to anyone that will listen. If we want Pyro to remain independent of UEE and alien influence, then something must be done about this now. That’s why XenoThreat is issuing a kill order for {Last}. And knowing how important they are to Citizens for Prosperity’s operations, I wouldn’t be surprised if you had to fight your way through a bunch of their most fanatical followers first before you even get a shot at them. But remember {Last} is your target, and payment hinges solely on you making sure they’re eliminated. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: friends to the end
missions.desc: I really hope that you're not buddies with {TargetName} or {TargetName2} because I need you to ghost the pair of them... at the same time... Of course they wouldn't make this easy on us and travel in the same ship or something obvious like that. No. You're going to have to put together a crew so that you can down both targets simultaneously. As soon as one of them is dead, be ready to drop the other one too. Can't risk either of them getting away. And I figure I should mention that not only are both pretty good pilots, but that they'll be traveling with backup too. Nothing you can't handle I'm sure.

missions.title: Guard Facility Against Dangerous Hostiles
missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Facility Protection CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent OUTSOURCE MANAGER: T. Spooner RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High RUSH CONTRACT: No A growing outlaw faction have been making threats against {Address} and Hurston Security requires a contractor to put together a security team and guard the facility against any incursions. Payment will be sent once the facility is confirmed to be safe. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

Spooner RISK ASSESSMENT: High RUSH CONTRACT: No Local criminals have been making threats against {Address} and Hurston Security is seeking a contractor to put together a security team to guard the facility against any incursions. Payment will be sent once the facility is confirmed to be safe. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.desc: HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT CONTRACT: Facility Protection CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent OUTSOURCE MANAGER: T. Spooner RISK ASSESSMENT: High RUSH CONTRACT: No A small local gang has been making threats against {Address} and Hurston Security is seeking a contractor to put together a security team to protect the facility against any incursions. Payment will be sent once the facility is confirmed to be safe. ** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

missions.title: Guard Site Against Dangerous Hostiles
missions.desc: Crusader Security has learned that {Address} is currently being threatened by a well-known gang operating in the area and we’re looking to hire an experienced security team to deal with any attacks. Try to make sure that whoever you bring along is properly qualified. You’re going to need all the help you can get to deal with this group. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Guard Site Against Hostiles
missions.desc: Crusader Security has learned that {Address} is currently being threatened by a local gang and we’re looking to hire a contractor to put together a security team to deal with any attacks. This gang has a bit of a record, but they’re still pretty green overall. I expect it will be relatively straightforward for you and your team to handle. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Guard Site Against Serious Hostiles
missions.desc: Crusader Security has learned that {Address} is currently being threatened by a group of criminals and we’re looking to hire a contractor to put together a security team to repel any attacks. I know you may be tempted to try to handle this on your own, but you need to put a team together for this. Trust me, the credits aren’t worth it to try it solo. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Head Hunting
missions.desc: The Headhunters have assembled a special strike team whose sole purpose is to attack, disrupt, and undermine our operations. As much as I’m loath to admit it, they’ve had a few small successes and are quickly becoming a concern. XenoThreat knows the best way to kill a snake is by cutting off its head, so we’re issuing a kill order for the strike team’s commander {TargetName}, who according to our intelligence sources, has been hiding at {Address} for a few days now. I’d expect strong resistance from the Headhunter forces there. From what we’ve heard, {Last} got this command partially because of the fierce loyalty they inspire in others. Putting your own crew together to tackle this would be a solid operational strategy. Happy Head Hunting, Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Help Me Get My Stuff Back
missions.desc: My brother was one of those people who died when that Covalex station near Crusader blew. Even worse, he was borrowing something of mine when it happened. Now some red tape asshole is trying to tell me that I have to wait to get my stuff back. Yeah right. First you kill my brother and now you want me to be patient? The nerve of these corporate jillos. Forget that. Instead, I figured I'd hire someone to go to Gundo to get my stuff and take it to {Destination} for me. I mean, what the hell are they gonna do about it? Anyway, it's what my brother would have wanted. It's gonna be the box marked 156. - Ed

variants.title: Help Me Get My Stuff Back

missions.title: Hit 'Em Where it Hurts
missions.desc: The muckers over at {Address} decided that it would be a good idea to interfere with our business, and now we need to let them know unequivocally that they were mistaken. A little bit of sniffin’ through their data and we were able to sus out where the idiots keep their stash. Now all we need you to do is head over there and destroy every last bit of it. Figure that should drive the point home. - Bit Zeros

missions.title: Idris War Game
missions.desc: To test the preparedness of our response teams, we would like volunteers to simulate an assault against a CDF Idris by neutralizing and taking control of the vessel. To be clear, the goal of the exercise is not to destroy the Idris, but for you to attempt to board the craft and maintain control of it as long as possible. Volunteers should expect to meet full resistance from the Idris' highly trained crew and are encouraged to get an updated imprint beforehand. Coordinates will be provided upon confirming your participation. Thanks and good luck.

missions.title: Illegal Blockade – Medical Supplies Needed
missions.desc: The illegal quantum blockade of {Location} has interrupted normal trade routes and essentials are in short supply. Crusader Security is looking for traders and haulers to provide much needed medical supplies to the station. Prices offered by the station administration will be adjusted to reflect the situation with the Nine Tails, and in addition, Crusader will provide a hazard bonus upon successful transfer of the medical supplies because of the increased risk. Thank you in advance for your support during these difficult times. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Director Sasha Rust ID# 122L964G

missions.title: Inmate Maintenance Opportunity
missions.desc: Hello Guests, We have recently been alerted that one of our Oxygen Dispensers has suffered a technical error. As you know these kiosks are vital to ensure that you have plenty of oxygen handy while participating in our Work Release Program. We are looking for any available guest to reset the kiosk. That should reconnect the kiosk to the network and resolve the issue. The first guest who's able to complete this task will not only be compensated with merits, but also with the satisfaction that they're making the workplace safer for other guests. Thank you.

missions.title: Kill Order: "Citizens" at {location}
missions.desc: The group of instigators that calls itself “Citizens for Prosperity” can no longer be allowed to continue spreading their lies and propaganda without repercussion. As a sharp reminder of who really controls Pyro we have issued a kill order to eradicate all “Citizen” presence at {address}. Resistance is likely, but we expect you to handle it with little difficulty. Do as directed and you’ll be paid well for your work. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: let's help each other
missions.desc: Hey there. I heard you ended up in Klescher which is a real drag. But it might actually be a lucky day for both of us. Long story short, I had somebody sneaking a datachip out of the prison, but they never got back to me. I know for a fact they haven’t left the facility, so I think something might have happened to them. While tragic, business must carry on. If you can get the chip and finish the job, I can clear your crimestat for you. What do you say? Of course, I don't know exactly how far they got, but I can tell you that the prison's got a whole network of hidden tunnels my guy was planning on using to make his escape. My guess is his corpse is rotting away somewhere there. Once you find the body, I’m hoping the chip will still be on him. When you’ve got it, finish escaping and get the data to me. There’s a spot nearby you can upload the chip’s contents. One warning though, you might want to watch out for Hurston Security. They've been a hassle lately, so I wouldn't be surprised if you ran into them. When I've got the data I’ll wipe your crimestat and then, voila, you’ll be free and clear. What you do after that is entirely up to you.

missions.title: Ling Contractor Re-evaluation
missions.desc: Hello, I'm not thrilled to have to do this, but we have a shortage of contractors and more deliveries than ever. I'm willing to give you another shot, but you need to complete the following delivery. PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> Last thing, it'd probably be a good idea to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with. Thanks, Conni Ling Shipment Coordinator Ling Family Hauling

missions.title: Ling Family Seeking New Contractors
missions.desc: Hi, We're a small family owned and operated delivery company that's currently seeking new contractors in the Crusader area. If you're interested in working with us, the following delivery would be a great trial to see if you're a good match for the company. PACKAGE FOR PICK UP · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATION · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to <EM4>{Address}</EM4> If all goes well, you'll become the newest member of Ling Family Hauling. Last thing, it'd probably be a good idea to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with. Thanks, Conni Ling Shipment Coordinator Ling Family Hauling

missions.title: Looking for Closure
missions.desc: They said that I could find someone here to go to Gundo for me and grab a crate that belonged to my wife. If the name didn't ring a bell, that's the station where they had that big accident. My wife worked for Covalex and I know it's not really going to make losing her any easier, but I really just want Claudia's stuff back. I think about her photo collection or the necklace I gave her just sitting there in that cold dead station in some box marked 249 and it's not right. She deserves better. So how about it? You willing to go to Gundo and haul her crate back to {Destination}?

missions.title: Major Malfunction
missions.desc: I won’t go into the whole long boring story of why, but there are a few bits of {Address} that we need destroyed. The important part is that I want to pay you a hefty chunk of credits to do it. I almost feel like you should be paying us for this because of how fun it’s going to be. Don’t even care how you get it done. Grenades, rocket launcher, day old Torpedo Burrito, it’s all the same to us. -Bit Zeros

missions.title: Medical Assistance
missions.desc: {InitiatorName} requires medical assistance at {InitiatorLocation}. Payment will be {PaymentAmount} aUEC.

missions.title: Medical Rescue
missions.desc: {InitiatorName} requires emergency medical treatment at {InitiatorLocation}. Payment will be {PaymentAmount} aUEC.

missions.title: Miles Eckhart Invite Illegal
missions.desc: {Description}

missions.title: Miles Eckhart Invite Legal
missions.desc: {Desc}

missions.title: money from nothing
missions.desc: Ever want to make creds just magically appear? A bunch of old CCB credit terminals are currently active and faking bank transactions to siphon off funds to whoever controls the terminals. If you want in on the action, I'll sell you the coordinates for a small fee. Better hurry if you want to make a play for it. Don’t know how long it'll stay up and running.

missions.title: My Dad's Stuff
missions.desc: Hi, I'm looking for someone to head to the Covalex Gundo station near Crusader and grab some items. I know this may sound like stealing, but it's my dad's stuff. You see, he was on Gundo station when it had its accident. My mom says that we need to wait until Covalex says so, but I don't think that's fair because I miss him so much. I would like something to remember him by and I don't want to wait any longer because I might start forgetting things. I'll pay you to get box 510 for me and take to {Destination} so I can have it. Thank you very much, Baylor Ward

missions.title: need an out?
missions.desc: Hi there. We haven’t had a chance to work together yet but I’m in a bit of a bind here and I could use another body. Not for nothing, of course. I’m all for a good quid pro quo. One of my associates who was serving some time in Klescher was supposed to bring me a datachip, but then they went quiet. Now I’m assuming they’re dead, but here’s the deal: if you finish his job, I wipe your crimestat. Not bad, right? Your predecessor was apparently planning on using some old tunnels to make his escape. He made it sound like they weren't exactly the easiest thing to access, but I trust you can figure it out. I'm guessing you'll find his body somewhere in there and if we’re lucky, he'll still have the chip on him. Once you get it, finish getting out however you can. Then get the data to me. There’s a spot nearby you can upload the chip’s contents. You might want to watch out for Hurston Security, though. They've been a hassle lately, so I wouldn't be surprised if you ran into them. After I get the data and validate it, I’ll wipe your crimestat. Then you can go and enjoy your newfound freedom. If you do this right, maybe I’ll have more lucrative work for you down the line.

missions.title: One-Two Combo
missions.desc: Have another pair that need to be eliminated: {TargetName} and {TargetName2} They've been in the wind for a few days now, but just popped up. If we don't get them now, I'm not sure we will get another chance. You need to enlist a partner to make sure both targets are hit at the same time. As far as them putting up resistance, {TargetName} is known to bring along a friend to watch their back, and I suspect {TargetName2} will do likewise.

missions.title: Open Bounty
missions.desc: {OpenBountyDescription}

missions.title: Overdrive Initative: Attack on XenoThreat
missions.desc: Attention, Naval forces have regrouped for the final assault that XenoThreat have been planning. The Navy has officially requested any CDF volunteers to help provide combat support in this final push to secure our system. This will include volunteers outside of those who have participated in the Overdrive Initiative. SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation. If successful, this will complete this Overdrive Initiative series and you will receive temporary access to the F7A Hornets or a free upgrade if you currently own an F7C.

missions.title: Overdrive Initative: Xenothreat Ambush - Support Needed

variants.title: Overdrive Initative: Xenothreat Ambush - Support Needed

missions.title: Overdrive Initiative: EMERGENCY AT KAREAH
missions.desc: Attention all CDF volunteers, we received a distress call from Security Post Kareah. It turns out XenoThreat used the comm arrays as a distraction to lure law enforcement away so they could launch an attack on the station. We've learned that they're attempting to access their systems, so all volunteers must immediately divert to retake Kareah and clear out all XenoThreat forces. As a reminder, the military has generously donated some old F7A Hornets for CDF members who see this initiative through to the end.

missions.title: Overdrive Initiative: Reward
missions.desc: Thank you for your diligence on this Overdrive Initiative. As promised, we've approved you for an upgrade from a civilian F7C mk ii to a military grade F7A mk ii if you have one. In addition, you've been given a temporary rental of a military F7A mk ii that you can access in your ASOP. _________________ To upgrade, visit the RSI website to apply the token, then restart the game and access the ship.

missions.title: Overdrive Initiative: SUPPLY REQUEST
missions.desc: Attention CDF volunteers, XenoThreat's gone off the grid. We suspect that they have gone dark in order to prep for the final phase of their plan. History has proven that XenoThreat like to fight so it stands to reason that this might be an attack of some kind so we're calling on volunteers to deliver supplies to the Gateway station near the Stanton-Pyro jump point to shore up for a potential assault. As a reminder, the military has generously donated some old F7A Hornets for CDF members who see this initiative through to the end.

missions.title: Pacheco Invite
missions.desc: {Description}

missions.title: Package Delivery for Ling
missions.desc: Hey, We need you to grab a delivery for us over at <EM4>{Address}</EM4> and then take it to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. I was originally going to send my brother Ricki to handle this, but he said the area’s too dangerous. Guess there’s been a bunch of security warnings around there, but as long as you’re careful and bring some guns or whatever, I’m sure you’ll be fine. You probably won’t even run into anything. Thanks, Conni Ling Shipment Coordinator Ling Family Hauling

missions.title: Permanently Delete
missions.desc: The slimy little cretins over at {Address} have been selling us trash data all while trying to double deal. Can’t let it stand. We want you to go teach them one final lesson and wipe out all the cowards you can find. Last I heard is they were holed up over near the {Location}. Spill their blood, and we’ll fill your wallet. -Bit Zeros

missions.title: Personal Effects
missions.desc: Hi, I'll totally understand if you don't want to help with this, but if you can it would be amazing. See, my boyfriend passed away during the Covalex Gundo tragedy. They said I would get all of Scott's stuff back once the investigation was complete, but as far as I know, it's been done for a while now and they still haven't given any indication of when I can get his property. It's been hard enough dealing with all this, and knowing that a package is going to show up in a month or two and rip open all these wounds, it's just too much. I would prefer to deal with it now and get it over with. If you could find a way to get his personal effects (Employee ID# 104) and drop them off at {Destination}, I'd be very grateful. Thanks for your help, Anya

missions.title: Personal Transport
missions.desc: {InitiatorName} is requesting transportation from {InitiatorLocation} to {SelectedDestination}. Upon the successful completion of this service, you will be paid {PaymentAmount} aUEC.

missions.title: Pro Tem Escapee Bounty Contract
missions.desc: Hey There, My name is Braden Corchado and I'm a logistics officer for Northrock Service Group, the leading independently-owned security firm operating in the Stanton system. I may have reached out already, but we try to make it a point of approaching anyone who meets our high standards and encouraging them to complete a pro tem contract. You can't do much better than become a Northrock contractor. We have a solid reputation for offering challenging and interesting work at a higher rate of pay then many of our competitors in system. Now, to get approved, you will need to apprehend one {TargetName}. They have recently escaped from the detention center and your job will be to track them down before they can disappear completely off the grid. A little hint is that it's safe to assume that the target is going to go try to clear their record. I recommend triangulating your search between the detention center they escaped from and locations where they can hack into the record system. Get this done and we'll see about getting you more work. Hope to hear from you soon, Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

missions.title: Pro Tem Escapee Bounty Contract (Reevaluation)
missions.desc: Hey, I know it's been a little while, but if you are still interested in doing contract work for Northrock, I convinced the management to give you a reevaluation. If you can successfully complete a bounty for us, we can see about getting your employment status reinstated. This pro tem contract is to track down escaped criminal {TargetName}. Try your best to get to them before they can wipe their record at database access point or the job's going to be significantly more difficult. Hoping we can trust you on this. Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

missions.title: Pro Tem Group Warrant (Reevaluation)
missions.desc: Hey, I've been thinking over everything that went down and decided to speak to management. They've agreed to give you another chance but only if you successfully complete a contract for us. We can look at reinstating your employment status if you can bring in this criminal trio: {Target1} {Target2} {Target3} They evaded the last Associate who went after them, so you bringing them all in would definitely earn you some points. Hopefully you've gotten your act together since your last job. Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

missions.title: Pro Tem Suspect Apprehension
missions.desc: Hi, Hope you don't mind, but I was made aware of your Bounty Hunters Guild status and wanted to reach out and see if you'd be interested in contracting with Northrock Service Group, one of the top rated private security firms in the system. If you are, the first step would be to complete a pro tem suspect apprehension. It's less of an evaluation and more of a chance to make sure that we can have a good working relationship. The suspect you would be after is known as <EM4>{TargetName}</EM4>. They are known to be particularly elusive so you may have your work cut out for you. Hope to hear from you soon, Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

missions.title: Pro Tem Suspect Apprehension (Reevaluation)
missions.desc: Hey again, It's been a little while, hope everything's okay. I know things didn't end on the best terms, but after discussing it with management, I would like to offer you an opportunity to redeem yourself. You had potential and I hate to think that you didn't have a proper chance to show what you're capable of. Apprehend <EM4>{TargetName}</EM4> and we can see about getting your employment status reinstated. Braden Corchado Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch Northrock Service Group

missions.title: Production Oversight
missions.desc: {LocalDeliveryDrugProdDesc}

missions.title: Protect Site
missions.desc: ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators We’ve gotten word from the security team at {Address} that some of the local scum have been launching attacks. BlacJac is looking to have you go to the site and assist in protecting it from hostile threats. Make sure you check your fire down there. I don't want to hear about any blue-on-blue incidents. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Provide Backup
missions.desc: Crusader Security has learned that {Address} is currently being threatened by a group of criminals. While we have security personnel on site, we are looking to hire additional contractors to help them repel any attacks. Now, as a contractor, I’m not sure how used to working with a team you are, but I don’t want to hear anything about "friendly fire" or there’s going to be problems. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: RED WIND DELIVERY PILOT NEEDED
missions.desc: RED WIND LINEHAUL 'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS' ---------------------------- Got a shipment waiting to be hauled from <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. I’ll be up front with you though, this spot doesn’t have the cleanest of reputations. That being said, they still need packages delivered and they got credits, so that’s all square. But if you go in there, there’s a good chance you might run into some trouble. Don’t take the job if you can’t handle that. TO ALL VETS - Red Wind appreciates your service to our Empire! Your struggles mean our freedom!

missions.title: Red Wind In Need of Discreet Couriers
missions.desc: RED WIND LINEHAUL 'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS' ---------------------------- I know you've done some solid work for us in the past, so I figured I'd see if you were interested in handling a bit of a special run for us that's a bit farther out in the system than what you've been doing so far. In a nutshell, we need a pilot who's willing to keep their head down, focus on getting the packages delivered, and most importantly, not ask a lot of questions. See, for a smaller company like us, staying ahead of competition means that we need to offer our clients something they can't get elsewhere - discretion. At Red Wind, as long as you got the credits we'll take whatever to wherever. Understand? If that sounds good to you, let's see how you do on this run - PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> One last bit of advice, it would probably be good to avoid any unnecessary delays once you got the packages onboard, for example being searched by local law enforcement.

variants.title: Red Wind In Need of Discreet Couriers

missions.title: Red Wind Seeking New Pilots
missions.desc: RED WIND LINEHAUL 'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS' ---------------------------- We're looking to hire an independent pilot that's interested in running a local route for us. PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> If you pull this off, we can see about other contracts in the future. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along. {SignOff}

missions.title: Reputation Management
missions.desc: Some assholes are refusing to pay us what we’re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we could’ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message. The fools are operating from {Address}. We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. We’ll send your payment once everyone’s taken care of. - Stows out.

missions.title: Retake Location
missions.desc: {RetakeLocationDescription}

missions.title: Revenge 01 (WIP)
missions.desc: Mission description (WIP)

missions.title: Running the Gauntlet
missions.desc: The CDF has partnered with Anvil Aerospace to find the most capable operatives in the system. If you find one of these Platinum certifications, you can redeem the ticket at a ship kiosk at New Deal, Astro Armada or Crusader Showroom for a free F8C. The catch is that your identity and location has been shared with participants throughout the system. For everyone else, if you can stop the ticketholder before they get to the kiosk, you can claim the ticket for your own. Whoever makes it will not only receive this next generation superiority fighter, but also prove that they have what it takes for the toughest CDF assignments. Good luck.

missions.title: Ruto Invite
missions.desc: {desc}

missions.title: Scavenge Surface Relay Prevent SP
missions.desc: {Description}

missions.title: Secure Bounty: {TargetName} (VHRT)
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend {TargetName} who has so far been able to evade capture. They are coordinating an active raid that has spread throughout {Address}. Our hope is that you may be able to finally draw them out of hiding if you confront their forces at several different attack points. With their numbers sufficiently weakened, {Last} will most likely risk exposure and you will be able to confront them directly. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation to {Address}. •Confront {TargetName}’s criminal associates to draw the target into the open. • Neutralize {TargetName}; using force if necessary. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • Access to combat equipment and mode of transport. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Ability to handle high pressure situations.

missions.title: Security Work Assessment
missions.desc: In an effort to increase the safety of Crusader and its environs, Crusader Security is seeking qualified individuals to assist with security work in the sector. We have determined that you possess the skill set needed to offer you an initial trial contract. You will be assisting Crusader Security in dealing with a small hostile group that has been making threats against {Address}. Please note that we already have security personnel on site, so you will have to be careful with regards to friendly fire. Upon the successful completion of this contract, you'll become eligible to apply for any future security work as it becomes available. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Security Work Reassessment
missions.desc: Congrats! Crusader Security has decided to offer you another chance at being a security contractor. With a little bit of hard work and effort, the hope is that you can rise above any previous performance issues. First though, to reassess your viability, we would like you to assist Crusader Security in dealing with an outlaw group that have been making threats against {Address}. Now, since you’ve had performance issues in the past, I’m going to remind you that friendly fire will not be tolerated. Upon the successful completion of this trial, you're eligibility will be restored and you'll once again be able to apply for security work with Crusader. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Seize the Data
missions.desc: Been hunting down a particular parcel of data and right when I get a break the ship gets attacked by this converted Nine Tails Reclaimer called the Black Kite. I tried to hack into the servers on the Black Kite to see if they copied the data, but couldn't find a way to remotely get past their encryption protocols without the physical key. That's where you come in. I need someone to breach their ship, get a hold of their decryption key, and decrypt the server so I can remotely pull down what I need. You're smart enough to know who we're dealing with here, so plan accordingly. Since it's gonna ruffle some powerful feathers, let's not leave anything to chance. Destroy the Black Kite when you're done to cover both our asses.

missions.title: Server Not Found
missions.desc: Hey, Got a problem we could use your help on. One of our former new-recruits did a complete crap job on a hack and wound up leaving a digital footprint so messy that it might as well be a full confession. A remote deletion’s not going to be good enough so I want you to go to {Address} and make sure their data servers are wiped from existence. As if this wasn’t a big enough of a mess already, the access codes to the locked server room door are only stored physically on site. That means you’re going to have to liberate a datapad with the code on it first before you can even get close to them. Don’t worry though. I’ll make sure the creds are worth all the hassle. - Bit Zeros

missions.title: simultaneous release
missions.desc: Guess what {TargetName} and {TargetName2} have in common? You're gonna kill 'em both! Difficult part is that I need you to kill them at the same time so that one doesn't have a chance to escape, or worse, kill the person trying to kill them. So put together a team to track one target while you handle the other. Divide and conquer! And despite the fact they made a mess big enough to get themselves killed, my understanding is that they are relative lightweights. Don't expect you to meet too much resistance.

missions.title: Stop Spying Op
missions.desc: My associates and I have found ourselves in a little predicament and could use some help. There’s an orbital sentry at {address} that’s spying on us. We don’t know who put it there, but it sure as hell can’t stay. Thing is we’re business minded folks first and foremost and worry that if we blow it up ourselves it’ll start shit. That’s why it’s better if someone like you does it. Should be a quick and easy gig for someone interested in earning some creds. - Smokey

missions.title: Supply Line Sabotage
missions.desc: The armchair “activists” of Citizens for Prosperity continue to try to spread their influence throughout the system. With your assistance, there is an opportunity to sever their operations at the roots. The group is using {address} to distribute supplies to independents scattered around the planet. If we destroy the {ship} located there, their network will fall. Bombardment would send a clear message, but I’ll leave it to you to decide the means of destruction. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: Surveillance Termination
missions.desc: It seems our struggle to free Humanity has got the government lapdogs back on Earth feeling nervous. Recent scans discovered an orbital sentry at {address} that we believe is part of an UEE espionage campaign. Good credits says they’re handing the data direct to the slinks themselves. Only one sentry has been detected so far, but who knows how big the operation will grow if it’s not taken off-line. Shouldn’t be too much trouble for a skilled merc. If that sounds like you, payment will be sent promptly once the sentry is destroyed. Plus, XenoThreat will remember that you’re someone willing to fight for what’s right. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: together forever
missions.desc: Here's the deal. {TargetName} and {TargetName2} need to die at the same time. Unfortunately, they aren't gonna be in the same place. A double hit can sound complicated, but if you hire some additional guns it shouldn't be all that hard to do two hits simultaneously. Make sure you find folks who have skills as I have it on good authority that each'll be flying with some escorts for "protection."

missions.title: Total Server Wipe
missions.desc: One of our datarunners went MIA while transporting vital operational information. A few hours ago, we determined that they were hit by a Headhunter raiding party and the contents of the ship’s datastores were transferred to their servers at {address}. While we have every reason to believe that our encryption will hold, we cannot take the risk that the contents of those files will be exposed. You are being ordered to head there and ensure our data remains private by destroying the Headhunter servers. I strongly encourage thoroughness. Raze everything and everyone you can to the ground. Comm. Spec. Engler

missions.title: twice the headache
missions.desc: Have another pair that needs simultaneous deathing. Seems to be getting more and more popular as a murder option. This time it's {TargetName} and {TargetName2}. Both are supposed to be pretty skilled operators and they won't be flying alone. I'd make sure whoever you get to help you on this one can handle a fight.

missions.title: two for the price of two
missions.desc: {TargetName} and {TargetName2}. I think they may be related? Or dating? Doesn't really matter, someone wants them killed. I've arranged it so that you can hit them when they're not flying together. Safer for you this way. They are both serious business and fly with equally serious backup. Make sure you and your crew time your attacks. I don't want one of them left alive or it's going to be a real headache.

variants.title: two for the price of two

missions.title: Two In The Head
missions.desc: Contract's for two targets that need to be taken out at the same time. Guess the client is worried that if they aren't eliminated together, one of them will go dark and try to get some revenge. They go by {TargetName} and {TargetName2}. Find yourself a team, divide and conquer. And make sure whoever it is has got skills, because these two have a reputation for holding their own in a fight and they for sure won't be alone. Be ready for them to give you some trouble.

missions.title: UDM Local Delivery Evaluation
missions.desc: Greetings Potential Qualified Shipping Partner! Ready to contribute to our growing and expanding delivery network? Have a vessel at your disposal that can carry several packages and fly between local planetary bodies and satellites? Unified Distribution Management is looking for a pilot just like you! We would love to evaluate your hiring potential with this carefully selected itinerary - PACKAGE FOR PICK UP · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATION · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> If this sounds like something you're interested in, accept this offer right away! Just be sure to bring your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for maximum efficiency. Looking forward to working with you, Unified Distribution Management -Delivering the Total Package-

missions.title: UDM Local Delivery Re-evaluation
missions.desc: Greetings Formerly Qualified Shipping Partner! Ready for another chance to use your cargo-ready vessel to earn credits? Unified Distribution Management has chosen the following carefully selected itinerary as the perfect way to re-evaluate your skills - PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> from the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> · Package <EM4>#{SerialNumber}</EM4> to the <EM4>{Address}</EM4> Just be sure to bring your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for maximum efficiency. Looking forward to working with you again, Unified Distribution Management -Delivering the Total Package-

missions.title: UDM Package Pick Up
missions.desc: Greetings Qualified Shipping Partner! If you’re looking for work as a delivery pilot, we have the perfect opportunity for you! A pick up is waiting at <EM4>{Address}</EM4> to be delivered to <EM4>{Address}</EM4>. Sounds fun, right? Warning, there have been multiple security alerts flagged in the area. Be sure to bring along some defensive measures so you can stay safe. If this sounds like something you're interested in, accept this offer right away! Looking forward to working with you, Unified Distribution Management -Delivering the Total Package-

missions.title: Unexpected Inheritance
missions.desc: Hey, So this is a little awkward for me to talk about, but it turns out that one of the people who passed away on that Covalex station disaster, Kyomi Santos, actually bequeathed me something in her will. I was surprised to hear it, but apparantly I'm now the proud owner of everything stored in box #173. The people at Covalex say I'll be able to get it when the station opens back up but ... this is the awkward part ... I kind of really need it right now. Normally I'd just wait, but I'm trying to start my own business (I make cakes in the shape of people's homeworlds) and the credits I get from selling it will really be a huge help. I've got a little bit stashed away now that I can use to pay for someone to deliver it from Gundo to {Destination} for me. I know the whole things a little bit irregular, but if there was any other way I wouldn't be asking. Thanks for the help, Thrace

missions.title: URGENT: Retake Security Post Kareah
missions.desc: Security Post Kareah is under attack by an unknown number of assailants. Crusader is seeking contractors to quickly travel to the station and eliminate all trespassers in the vicinity before our security forces are overwhelmed. We’re not sure whether the attackers are targeting the contraband in our evidence lockup or our CrimeStat database, but whatever they’re after, they need to be dealt with. You will receive a combat bonus for each target neutralized. By accepting this contract, you agree to abide by all Crusader Security protocols: If you harm any guards or other authorized contractors while on the station, your contract will be terminated and you will be marked as a target. Time is of the essence, but make sure you’re well equipped to handle the hostiles before responding. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Verified Freelancer Bounty Assessment
missions.desc: In an effort to increase the safety of Crusader and its environs, Crusader Security is seeking qualified individuals to assist with the collection of bounties in the area. We have evaluated that you possess the skill set needed and as such, we would like to offer you an initial trial bounty contract for {TargetName} last seen at {Address}. Upon the successful completion of this contract, you will be placed on Crusader's Verified Freelancer list and be eligible for any future bounty collection work as it becomes available. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Verified Freelancer Bounty Reassessment
missions.desc: Good news! Crusader Security has decided to offer you another chance at being a bounty contractor. We are hoping that during this time you have corrected any past performance issues and can once again be a useful asset. First though, we are required to reevaluate you, and as such, would like you to complete this bounty contract for {TargetName}. Upon the successful completion of this trial, you'll be restored to Crusader's Verified Freelancer list and be eligible for any future bounty collection work as it becomes available. CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY: Liaison Officer Bautista ID# 948J030K

missions.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: {TargetName} (ERT)
missions.desc: ATTN: Bounty Hunters You might have heard of {TargetName} before. They’re an extreme-risk target and they’ve been making headlines recently. The hope is you’ll be able to put together a response team and help BlacJac shut them down for good. Our most recent intel has their sub-capital ship and heavily armed escorts flying over at {Address}. I’d recommend making sure you’ve got an up-to-date imprint before heading out. Just in case. Good luck, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: {TargetName} (HRT)
missions.desc: ATTN: Bounty Hunters Your next bounty, {TargetName}, is definitely considered a high-risk target for good reason. They’re known to travel with some serious firepower and are escorted by enough protection to make anyone think twice about picking a fight. Sources indicate that {Last} is hiding out over at {Address}. When you head out to track them down, just make sure you’re prepared. Might even think about bringing along some backup yourself. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: {TargetName} (LRT)
missions.desc: ATTN: Bounty Hunters Bounty came in for a low-risk target by the name of {TargetName}. The target themselves isn’t all that much to worry about, but it seems that they typically fly in a pack, so there’s a high chance they’ll have a few friends along when you track them down. Speaking of, I’d start the hunt over at {Address} since we have reports of them being spotted in the area. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: {TargetName} (MRT)
missions.desc: ATTN: Bounty Hunters Need you to sort out {TargetName}, a moderate-risk bounty last seen at {Address} flying a small, multicrew ship. We weren’t able to get details on exactly what they were piloting, but it seems they did have a few other ships with them. Be ready for a fair bit of resistance when you come calling. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: {TargetName} (VHRT)
missions.desc: ATTN: Bounty Hunters BlacJac just got word that a very high-risk target, {TargetName}, was spotted moving through the flight lanes over at {Address} piloting a formidable ship with a heavy escort. We want this bounty closed out before they commit any more crimes. Gather whatever resources or support you need, and head out as soon as you can. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: {TargetName} (VLRT)
missions.desc: ATTN: Bounty Hunters Got a very low-risk target I need you to take care of: {TargetName}. Their last known location was {Address}. This is a low threat bounty, so I expect you to be able to clear it pretty fast. They typically fly a small ship and don’t have very many known acquaintances. It doesn't get much more straightforward than that. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

missions.title: Wildlife Control: {Creature}
missions.desc: ABOUT THE JOB microTech Protection Services need a professional to bring the number of {Creature} in the wild back to within acceptable parameters. Their population is increasing too quickly, and culling some of their numbers will help ensure the situation doesn’t spiral out of control. RESPONSIBILITIES • Provide own transportation. • Locate the {Creature} on {Location}. • Use force as necessary to eliminate the {Creature}. MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS • 1 year of relevant mercenary and/or security experience. • Access to combat equipment. • Available for immediate deployment. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Experience with extermination For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

missions.title: Wipe Out Drug Stash
missions.desc: ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators It seems there’s a new operator trying their hand at manufacturing drugs over at {Address}, but the product they’re putting out is extremely toxic. We’re sorting through how to handle the arrests, but the important thing is to prevent any more of their supply getting distributed. I need you to get down there and destroy the drugs they’re storing on site. There's a good chance the facility isn't abandoned, so you might run into these thugs when you head down there, so be ready for a fight. But if their gun skills are anything like their chemistry, it probably won’t be much of one. Thanks, Gloria Mesa Private Contract Supervisor BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"
